Glencore — operates Mutanda and Katanga Mining (KCC) copper-cobalt mines, among the world's largest. CMOC (China Molybdenum Co.) — operates Tenke Fungurume, one of the world's largest copper-cobalt mines. Entreprise Générale du Cobalt (EGC) — state-backed enterprise intended to monopolize artisanal cobalt purchasing (established 2019). RMI (Responsible Minerals Initiative) — industry-led supply chain due diligence program used by electronics and automotive manufacturers.

Ministry of Mines — oversees खनन policy, licensing, and the 2018 Mining Code (Code Minier), which increased royalty rates and introduced strategic substance classification for cobalt. CTCPM (Cellule Technique de Coordination et de Planification Minière) — the technical coordination unit for खनन sector planning. ITSCI (ITRI Tin Supply Chain Initiative) — a traceability program for tin, tantalum, and tungsten (3T) minerals from the DRC.

Parlement de la République démocratique du Congo — bicameral legislature consisting of the Assemblée nationale (500 members) and the Sénat (108 members). The DRC is a semi-presidential republic but governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers. EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542) — effective 2027, requires carbon footprint declarations, recycled content minimums, and supply chain due diligence for batteries containing cobalt. OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Supply Chains of Minerals from Conflict-Affected and High-Risk Areas — the international standard for mineral supply chain responsibility.

CG.s: Oil-dependent अर्थव्यवस्था ($15.7B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 34.74% combined oil and gas rents — one of Sub-Saharan Africa's highest. TotalEnergies and Eni are major operators. Governance challenges with long-ruling president (Sassou Nguesso since 1997). Significant tropical forest cover.

sectors.w: Congo-Brazzaville's oil production is in long-term decline from mature offshore fields. As extraction costs rise and reserves deplete, the अतिव्यापी हित between international operators and government revenue कमजोर होता है — diversification becomes necessary.
bp: Redirect oil revenues to economic diversification (forestry, agriculture, services) through transparent budget allocation. जब non-oil sectors generate more employment and revenue, अतिव्यापी हित continued extraction from depleting fields breaks.
कार्यान्वित करें EITI-standard per-block revenue and उत्सर्जन disclosure. Congo joined EITI in 2004 — extending to पर्यावरणीय data makes W computable per production unit.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations at oil facilities to the Ministry of Environment
Document revenue discrepancies — report to EITI Congo multi-stakeholder group
Report concerns to international operator compliance channels (TotalEnergies, Eni)
TotalEnergies, Eni: कार्यान्वित करें Paris-aligned transition plans for Congo operations
SNPC: विकसित करें economic diversification strategy using petroleum revenues
अपनाएं per-block उत्सर्जन reporting standards
Ministry of Hydrocarbons: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय conditions in production sharing contracts
EITI Congo: Expand reporting to include पर्यावरणीय impact data
Central Bank (BEAC): Integrate resource revenue volatility risk into macroprudential supervision
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: CEMAC for regional पर्यावरणीय standards in oil and gas extraction
Support EITI enhanced reporting with पर्यावरणीय metrics
के लिए दबाव डालें: Central African Forest Initiative (CAFI) enforcement on forest protection as alternative revenue source
Leverage UNFCCC mechanisms for fossil fuel transition support
i: Ministère de l'Environnement, du Développement Durable et du Bassin du Congo — the environment ministry. SNPC (Société Nationale des Pétroles du Congo) — the national oil company. EITI Congo — the Republic of Congo has been an EITI member since 2004. Note: Whistleblower protections are minimal under current governance.

TotalEnergies — the largest oil operator in Congo-Brazzaville, operating the Moho Nord deepwater project and other fields. Eni — operates significant offshore concessions. SNPC (Société Nationale des Pétroles du Congo) — the national oil company holding state equity in all production sharing contracts.

Ministère des Hydrocarbures — oversees oil and gas policy and licensing. BEAC (Banque des États de l'Afrique Centrale) — the central bank of the CEMAC monetary zone (shared with Cameroon, CAR, Chad, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon). EITI Congo — publishes annual reports on extractive industry revenues.

Note: Congo-Brazzaville under President Sassou Nguesso is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée nationale (151 members) and Sénat (72 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International engagement channels: CEMAC (Communauté Économique et Monétaire de l'Afrique Centrale), African Union, CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) — a partnership between Central African countries and donors to protect tropical forests.

CI.s: Largest अर्थव्यवस्था in francophone West Africa ($87.1B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). World's largest cocoa producer (~45% of global supply). Agriculture is 15.9% of सकल घरेलू उत्पाद with cocoa, coffee, and palm oil as main cash crops. Growing oil production (oil=0.7%). Rapid economic growth (~7% annual average).

sectors.w: Côte d'Ivoire's cocoa monoculture has driven 80%+ of original forest loss. EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) will require वनों की कटाई-free supply chains — when per-farm वनों की कटाई data is linked to cocoa transactions, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance forces traceability to farm level. जब cocoa buyers must verify zero-वनों की कटाई, the अतिव्यापी हित between traders and smallholders in clearing forest for new plantations breaks — agroforestry becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-farm पर्यावरणीय data (tree cover, soil carbon, water use) linked to cocoa lot traceability. The Cocoa and Forests Initiative already creates a framework — extending to mandatory data makes W computable from cocoa prices.

आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Cocoa monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity compared to native forest. However, cocoa agroforestry systems can maintain significant tree cover and biodiversity — Côte d'Ivoire's National REDD+ Strategy includes agroforestry targets.
a: Report illegal वनों की कटाई for cocoa expansion to SODEFOR (Société de Développement des Forêts) or OIPR (Office Ivoirien des Parcs et Réserves)
Document child labor in cocoa production — report to CNS (Comité National de Surveillance des actions de lutte contre le travail des enfants)
Report pesticide misuse — notify ANADER (Agence Nationale d'Appui au Développement Rural)
Cocoa traders (Cargill, Barry Callebaut, Olam): कार्यान्वित करें full farm-level traceability ahead of EUDR deadline
में निवेश करें cocoa agroforestry systems that maintain tree cover while improving yields
अपनाएं living income reference price commitments for cocoa farmers
CCC (Conseil du Café-Cacao): लागू करें traceability requirements and link farmgate prices to पर्यावरणीय compliance
MINEDD (Ministry of Environment): मजबूत करें enforcement against वनों की कटाई in classified forests
ANADER: Scale agroforestry extension programs to all cocoa-growing regions
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Député in the Assemblée nationale की मांग करने के लिए enforcement of the Forest Code and protection of classified forests
Support EU Deforestation Regulation implementation with adequate transition support for smallholder farmers
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: the Cocoa and Forests Initiative for binding वनों की कटाई targets
के लिए दबाव डालें: living income benchmarks in international cocoa pricing through ICCO
i: SODEFOR (Société de Développement des Forêts) — the state forestry company responsible for managing classified forests, many of which have been illegally cleared for cocoa. OIPR (Office Ivoirien des Parcs et Réserves) — manages national parks and protected areas. CNS (Comité National de Surveillance) — the national committee monitoring child labor in cocoa, coordinated with the International Cocoa Initiative (ICI). ANADER — the national rural development support agency providing agricultural extension services.

Major cocoa traders operating in Côte d'Ivoire: Cargill, Barry Callebaut, Olam International, Sucden. These companies intermediate the majority of Ivorian cocoa exports. Cocoa and Forests Initiative (CFI) — a public-private partnership between cocoa-producing countries (Côte d'Ivoire, Ghana) and leading chocolate companies to end वनों की कटाई in cocoa supply chains. The Conseil du Café-Cacao (CCC) — the Ivorian cocoa board that sets farmgate prices and regulates the sector.

CCC (Conseil du Café-Cacao) — the government body regulating Côte d'Ivoire's cocoa and coffee sectors, setting minimum farmgate prices, managing quality standards, and overseeing exports. MINEDD (Ministère de l'Environnement et du Développement Durable) — the environment ministry responsible for forest protection, climate policy, and पर्यावरणीय regulation.

Assemblée nationale de Côte d'Ivoire — unicameral parliament with 255 members. Citizens can contact deputies through the official Assembly website. Sénat — the upper house (99 members, established 2020). ICCO (International Cocoa Organization) — the intergovernmental body coordinating global cocoa policy, headquartered in Abidjan. EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR, 2023/1115) — requires EU importers to verify that commodities including cocoa are not linked to वनों की कटाई after December 2020.

CL.s: Upper-middle-income अर्थव्यवस्था ($330.3B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with massive खनन sector (16.23% of सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). World's largest copper producer (~27% of global supply) and second-largest lithium producer. Strong institutions and democratic governance. Renewable energy leader in Latin America (solar in Atacama).

sectors.w: Chile's copper and lithium खनन depletes water resources in the Atacama Desert (one of Earth's driest regions). जब प्रति खदान water consumption data is published alongside production revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है from खनन output data.
bp: कार्यान्वित करें water pricing that reflects true scarcity in खनन regions. जब miners pay the real cost of water extraction in hyper-arid zones, अतिव्यापी हित water-intensive extraction methods कमजोर होता है — desalination and dry processing become economically preferred.

Mandatory प्रति खदान water balance, tailings chemistry, and उत्सर्जन disclosure. Chile's SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente) already collects पर्यावरणीय data — making it publicly accessible per mine makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. However, dry processing, desalination, and tailings reprocessing can significantly reduce water dependence and waste generation.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente)
Document water rights violations — report to DGA (Dirección General de Aguas)
Use Chile's मुखबिर law (Ley 21.015) and पर्यावरणीय complaint channels (denuncia ambiental) for protected reporting
CODELCO (state copper company): Transition to desalinated water for all operations
अपनाएं Science Based Targets for उत्सर्जन reduction across खनन operations
कार्यान्वित करें ICMM Mining Principles including tailings management standards
SMA: Increase पर्यावरणीय monitoring frequency and enforce water extraction limits at खनन operations
Sernageomin: मजबूत करें tailings dam safety standards (Chile has 740+ tailings facilities)
Ministry of Mining: कार्यान्वित करें the National Lithium Strategy with binding पर्यावरणीय standards
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional की मांग करने के लिए mandatory water-neutral खनन operations through desalination requirements
Support the Escazú Agreement on पर्यावरणीय access rights in Latin America (Chile has not ratified)
Advocate for OECD Due Diligence Guidance enforcement for खनन supply chains
के लिए दबाव डालें: international coordination on critical mineral sustainability standards through the Minerals Security Partnership
i: SMA (Superintendencia del Medio Ambiente) — Chile's पर्यावरणीय enforcement agency, responsible for monitoring compliance with पर्यावरणीय permits (RCA — Resolución de Calificación Ambiental). SMA can impose fines up to $8.2M and order facility closure. DGA (Dirección General de Aguas) — the national water authority managing water rights and monitoring extraction. SEA (Servicio de Evaluación Ambiental) — conducts पर्यावरणीय impact assessments for खनन projects.

CODELCO (Corporación Nacional del Cobre) — Chile's सरकारी copper company and the world's largest copper producer. CODELCO operates Chuquicamata, El Teniente, and other major mines. SQM (Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile) — one of the world's largest lithium producers, operating in the Salar de Atacama. Albemarle — US company operating lithium extraction in the Salar de Atacama alongside SQM. BHP, Anglo American — major international copper खनन companies operating in Chile.

Sernageomin (Servicio Nacional de Geología y Minería) — the national geological and खनन service, responsible for mine safety, tailings dam oversight, and geological surveys. Chile has over 740 tailings facilities, the largest inventory in the world. Ministry of Mining — oversees खनन policy including the 2023 National Lithium Strategy, which established state-led lithium development through public-private partnerships.

Congreso Nacional de Chile — bicameral legislature consisting of the Cámara de Diputadas y Diputados (155 members) and the Senado (50 members). Citizens can contact representatives through camara.cl and senado.cl. Chile is an OECD member with strong democratic institutions. Escazú Agreement — the Regional Agreement on Access to Information, Public Participation and Justice in Environmental Matters in Latin America and the Caribbean. Chile signed but has not ratified.

CM.s: Central African अर्थव्यवस्था ($53.3B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with oil production (2.94% combined rents) and significant agriculture (18.5% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद — cocoa, palm oil, timber). Forest cover declining due to logging and agricultural expansion. Governance challenges and Anglophone crisis.

sectors.w: Cameroon's oil production is declining from mature fields. As extraction costs rise, the अतिव्यापी हित between operators (Perenco, Addax) and government revenue कमजोर होता है — diversification to sustainable forestry and agriculture becomes economically rational.
bp: Redirect declining oil revenues to sustainable forest management and agricultural diversification. Cameroon's forests are a carbon sink worth more standing than cleared. जब REDD+ payments exceed marginal oil revenue, अतिव्यापी हित continued extraction breaks.
कार्यान्वित करें EITI-standard per-block पर्यावरणीय disclosure. Cameroon's EITI membership provides the framework — extending to पर्यावरणीय data makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to MINEPDED (Ministry of Environment, Nature Protection and Sustainable विकसित करेंment)
Document illegal logging or land seizures — report to international forestry monitoring organizations (Global Forest Watch)
Report through EITI Cameroon multi-stakeholder channels
Perenco, Addax/Sinopec: कार्यान्वित करें पर्यावरणीय monitoring and उत्सर्जन reporting for all Cameroon operations
SNH: विकसित करें post-oil diversification strategy
अपनाएं TCFD-aligned climate disclosure
MINMIDT (Ministry of Mines): मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय conditions in production licenses
MINEPDED: लागू करें पर्यावरणीय impact assessment requirements
EITI Cameroon: Expand reporting to पर्यावरणीय data
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Député in the Assemblée nationale की मांग करने के लिए transparent management of declining oil revenues
Support CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) for forest conservation as alternative revenue
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: CEMAC for regional पर्यावरणीय standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: EITI enhanced reporting
i: MINEPDED (Ministère de l'Environnement, de la Protection de la Nature et du Développement Durable) — Cameroon's environment ministry. SNH (Société Nationale des Hydrocarbures) — the national hydrocarbons company managing state interests in oil and gas. EITI Cameroon — member since 2007. Note: Whistleblower protections are limited.

Perenco — the largest oil producer in Cameroon. Addax Petroleum (Sinopec subsidiary) — operates offshore concessions. SNH manages the state's petroleum interests and holds equity in production sharing contracts.

MINMIDT (Ministère des Mines, de l'Industrie et du Développement Technologique) — oversees खनन and industrial policy. CONAC (Commission Nationale Anti-Corruption) — Cameroon's anti-corruption commission.

Assemblée nationale du Cameroun — 180 members. Sénat — 100 members. Note: Cameroon's democratic institutions are constrained under long-ruling President Paul Biya (in power since 1982). International channels: CEMAC, African Union, CAFI.

CO.s: Major Latin American अर्थव्यवस्था ($418.8B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with significant oil (3.42% rents) and coal (0.73% rents) production. Ecopetrol is the largest company. Biodiversity hotspot (most biodiverse country per square kilometer). 2016 peace agreement with FARC opened new governance challenges in former conflict zones.

sectors.w: Colombia's current administration (Petro, 2022-) has announced a policy of no new oil exploration licenses. If maintained, अतिव्यापी हित fossil fuel expansion breaks as existing fields deplete. Colombia's renewable potential (hydro, solar, wind) provides viable alternatives.
bp: Maintain and implement the no-new-exploration-licenses policy while investing transition revenues in नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा. जब energy investment flows shift from fossil to renewable, अतिव्यापी हित continued exploration breaks.

Mandatory प्रति क्षेत्र उत्सर्जन disclosure for all Ecopetrol and international operator fields. Colombia's ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) already collects production data — extending to उत्सर्जन makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to ANLA (Autoridad Nacional de Licencias Ambientales)
Document community health impacts near oil operations — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through Ecopetrol's ethics line or international operator compliance channels
Ecopetrol: Accelerate energy transition strategy with binding renewable targets
कार्यान्वित करें TCFD-aligned reporting across all operations
में निवेश करें नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा in post-conflict zones to provide economic alternatives
MinAmbiente: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय licensing for extractive projects in biodiverse regions
CREG: सुधार करें energy tariffs to accelerate नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा deployment
ANH: कार्यान्वित करें प्रति क्षेत्र उत्सर्जन monitoring
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Representante or Senador in the Congreso to support the energy transition framework legislation
मजबूत करें Colombia's NDC with binding sectoral उत्सर्जन reduction targets
Leverage OECD membership to advance पर्यावरणीय governance standards
Support the Leticia Pact for Amazon conservation as alternative economic model
i: ANLA (Autoridad Nacional de Licencias Ambientales) — Colombia's पर्यावरणीय licensing authority, responsible for पर्यावरणीय impact assessment and compliance monitoring for extractive projects. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national human rights ombudsman. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office overseeing public resource management including oil revenues.

Ecopetrol — Colombia's largest company (88.5% सरकारी), responsible for most domestic oil production. Ecopetrol has announced energy transition targets but continues significant upstream investment. ANH (Agencia Nacional de Hidrocarburos) — manages exploration and production contracts.

MinAmbiente (Ministerio de Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible) — Colombia's environment ministry. CREG (Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas) — the ऊर्जा नियामकy commission. CAR (Corporaciones Autónomas Regionales) — regional पर्यावरणीय authorities.

Congreso de la República de Colombia — bicameral legislature: Cámara de Representantes (188 members) and Senado (108 members). Contact through camara.gov.co and senado.gov.co. Colombia is an OECD member (2020) with strong democratic institutions. The 2016 Peace Agreement (Acuerdo de Paz) created new governance frameworks for former conflict zones that intersect with extractive industry regulation.

CR.s: Upper-middle-income अर्थव्यवस्था ($95.4B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 98%+ renewable electricity generation. No military since 1948. Services-dominant (68.8% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Leader in ecotourism and पर्यावरणीय policy. Low direct fossil fuel extraction. Main PST exposure through agricultural monoculture (pineapple, banana, palm oil).

sectors.w: Costa Rica's pineapple and banana monoculture uses intensive pesticide application that contaminates waterways. जब per-farm pesticide runoff and water contamination data is published alongside export revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: सुधार करें agricultural export incentives to reward biodiversity-positive farming. जब export tax benefits require पर्यावरणीय certification, the अतिव्यापी हित between monoculture producers and exporters in chemical-intensive production कमजोर होता है.

Mandatory per-farm water quality monitoring downstream of monoculture operations. Costa Rica's AyA (water utility) and SINAC already collect water data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Tropical monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, Costa Rica's Payment for Environmental Services (PSA) program demonstrates viable alternatives.
a: Report pesticide violations to SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado)
Document water contamination — report to MINAE (Ministry of Environment) or AyA
Use Costa Rica's labor protections and पर्यावरणीय complaint mechanisms
Agricultural exporters (Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita): अपनाएं pesticide reduction targets
में निवेश करें organic certification and agroforestry transitions
कार्यान्वित करें watershed-level पर्यावरणीय monitoring
MAG (Ministry of Agriculture): सुधार करें export incentives to require पर्यावरणीय certification
MINAE: मजबूत करें pesticide regulations and enforce water quality standards near monoculture areas
SETENA: Require cumulative पर्यावरणीय impact assessments for monoculture expansion
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Diputado in the Asamblea Legislativa की मांग करने के लिए pesticide reduction legislation for monoculture agriculture
Support the Escazú Agreement implementation (Costa Rica was an early advocate)
Leverage Costa Rica's पर्यावरणीय reputation to advance international agricultural sustainability standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: green trade provisions in bilateral agreements
i: SFE (Servicio Fitosanitario del Estado) — the state phytosanitary service regulating pesticide use. MINAE (Ministerio de Ambiente y Energía) — the environment and energy ministry. AyA (Instituto Costarricense de Acueductos y Alcantarillados) — the national water utility. SETENA (Secretaría Técnica Nacional Ambiental) — conducts पर्यावरणीय impact assessments.

Costa Rica hosts operations of major fruit multinationals: Del Monte, Dole, Chiquita. CORBANA (Corporación Bananera Nacional) — the national banana corporation coordinating the sector. CANAPEP (Cámara Nacional de Productores y Exportadores de Piña) — the pineapple producers' association.

MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería) — Costa Rica's agriculture ministry. The PSA (Pago por Servicios Ambientales) program — Costa Rica's pioneering payment for पर्यावरणीय services program, which pays landowners to maintain forest cover, funded partly by a fuel tax.

Asamblea Legislativa de Costa Rica — unicameral parliament with 57 members. Citizens can contact representatives through asamblea.go.cr. Costa Rica is one of Latin America's strongest democracies and a global पर्यावरणीय leader. The Escazú Agreement — Costa Rica was one of the first signatories of this regional agreement on पर्यावरणीय access rights.

CU.s: Command अर्थव्यवस्था ($107.4B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, though estimates vary due to dual currency system). Services-dominant (73.5% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, driven by healthcare, education, tourism). Minimal resource extraction. Economic crisis exacerbated by US embargo and collapse of Venezuelan oil subsidies.

sectors.w: Cuba's sugar industry collapsed after Soviet subsidies ended, but remaining agriculture (state farms, cooperatives) relies on monoculture patterns. Cuba's organic farming necessity (post-Soviet fertilizer shortage) demonstrates alternative models. Making soil health data visible breaks system independence.
bp: Expand the urban agriculture and organoponics model that Cuba developed out of necessity. जब organic production meets domestic food needs more reliably than import-dependent monoculture, अतिव्यापी हित conventional agriculture breaks.
Publish soil health, water quality, and biodiversity data from Cuba's extensive agricultural research system. Cuba's scientific institutions (INIFAT, ICA) generate data that could make W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Cuba's experience with organic farming post-1991 shows that प्रणाली निर्भरता on chemical inputs can be dramatically reduced through agroecological methods.
a: Document पर्यावरणीय degradation through academic research channels
Report through workplace union structures (CTC — Central de Trabajadores de Cuba)
Engage with international agricultural research partnerships
State agricultural enterprises: Scale organoponics and agroecological methods
AZCUBA: Diversify sugar industry toward bioenergy and specialty products
International partners: Support technology transfer for sustainable agriculture
MINAG: Expand support for agroecological transition
CITMA: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय monitoring of agricultural practices
INIFAT: Publish research on agroecological transition outcomes
Support FAO technical cooperation programs for Cuban agricultural sustainability
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: CELAC for regional agricultural knowledge exchange
के लिए दबाव डालें: relaxation of US embargo restrictions on agricultural technology transfer
Support South-South cooperation on agroecological methods developed in Cuba
i: Note: Cuba is a एक-दलीय राज्य. Independent नागरिक समाज, media, and labor organizations are not permitted. Reporting channels operate within state structures. CTC (Central de Trabajadores de Cuba) — the state-controlled trade union federation. INIFAT (Instituto Nacional de Investigaciones Fundamentales en Agricultura Tropical) — the national agricultural research institute. CITMA (Ministerio de Ciencia, Tecnología y Medio Ambiente) — the science and environment ministry.

AZCUBA (Empresa Azucarera) — Cuba's state sugar enterprise. State agricultural enterprises and UBPCs (Unidades Básicas de Producción Cooperativa) — cooperatives managing most agricultural production. Cuba's urban agriculture program is one of the world's most successful, producing significant food in cities through organoponics.

MINAG (Ministerio de la Agricultura) — Cuba's agriculture ministry. CITMA — oversees पर्यावरणीय policy and scientific research. The Asociación Nacional de Agricultores Pequeños (ANAP) — the national small farmers' association, which has been a key partner in agroecological transition.

Note: Cuba's Asamblea Nacional del Poder Popular (605 members) is the legislature but functions within a one-party system. International engagement channels: FAO (Cuba has received recognition for reducing hunger), CELAC (Community of Latin American and Caribbean States), NAM (Non-Aligned Movement). Cuba's agroecological experience is studied globally as a model for post-petrochemical agriculture.

CY.s: Small EU island अर्थव्यवस्था ($37.6B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with dominant services sector (76.5% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, driven by financial services, shipping, and tourism). No significant resource extraction. Post-2013 banking crisis reforms strengthened financial regulation. Division between Republic of Cyprus and northern territory.

sectors.w: Cyprus's financial services sector has historically facilitated capital flows from Russia and other jurisdictions. EU AML directives and beneficial ownership पारदर्शिता requirements make the welfare impact of opaque financial intermediation computable.
bp: Full implementation of EU Anti-Money Laundering Directives and beneficial ownership पारदर्शिता. जब financial secrecy is eliminated, the अतिव्यापी हित between Cypriot service providers and clients seeking opacity कमजोर होता है.

Mandatory publication of Country-by-Country Reporting (CbCR) data for entities registered in Cyprus. EU ATAD and DAC6 frameworks provide the mechanism — making tax planning structures visible breaks system independence.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Financial intermediation can relocate — but Cyprus's यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्यship, common law heritage, and timezone advantages create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to MOKAS (Unit for Combating Money Laundering)
Document beneficial ownership concealment — report to CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission)
Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections (transposed 2022)
कार्यान्वित करें enhanced due diligence for all high-risk client relationships
अपनाएं full beneficial ownership पारदर्शिता ahead of EU AMLD6 requirements
Integrate ESG criteria into financial advisory services
CySEC: मजबूत करें beneficial ownership verification requirements

i: MOKAS (Μονάδα Καταπολέμησης Αδικημάτων Συγκάλυψης / Unit for Combating Money Laundering) — Cyprus's financial intelligence unit. CySEC (Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission) — the securities and financial markets regulator. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — the prudential supervisor of banks. Cyprus transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Cyprus hosts approximately 40 licensed banks and numerous investment firms. The Cyprus Investment Firms sector manages significant cross-border capital flows. CIFA (Cyprus Investment Funds Association) — the industry association representing investment fund managers.

CySEC — responsible for securities regulation and investment firm supervision. CBC (Central Bank of Cyprus) — conducts banking supervision and AML compliance monitoring. ICPAC — the professional body for accountants and auditors in Cyprus.

Βουλή των Αντιπροσώπων (House of Representatives) — unicameral parliament with 56 elected members (80 seats including 24 reserved for Turkish Cypriot community). Contact through parliament.cy. Cyprus is an यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्य with robust democratic institutions. Moneyval (Council of Europe's Committee of Experts on the Evaluation of Anti-Money Laundering Measures) evaluates Cyprus's AML framework.

CZ.s: Central European industrial अर्थव्यवस्था ($347B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with strong manufacturing (19.9% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, automotive-dominated). Small coal sector (lignite in northern Bohemia). यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्य. Significant nuclear energy capacity (Dukovany, Temelín). सेवाएँ 60.2% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद.

sectors.w: Czechia's lignite खनन is concentrated in the Ústí nad Labem region (Sokolovská uhelná, Severní energetická). EU ETS carbon pricing makes Czech lignite uncompetitive — the अतिव्यापी हित between mine operators and local employment breaks when carbon costs exceed revenue.
bp: Align with EU ETS carbon pricing and eliminate free allowances for Czech lignite power. जब plants pay the full carbon price, lignite electricity becomes more expensive than alternatives and the अतिव्यापी हित breaks.
Mandatory प्रति संयंत्र उत्सर्जन and health-impact reporting. Czech lignite plants cause significant air pollution — publishing health costs per MWh makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. Lignite combustion releases CO₂ and pollutants by physical process.

Document health impacts in खनन communities — report to regional public health authorities

i: ČIŽP (Česká inspekce životního prostředí / Czech Environmental Inspectorate) — the enforcement agency for पर्यावरणीय law, conducting inspections and imposing प्रतिबंध. MŽP (Ministerstvo životního prostředí / Ministry of the Environment) — oversees पर्यावरणीय policy. Zákon o ochraně oznamovatelů (Act on Protection of Whistleblowers, 2023) — Czech transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

ČEZ Group — Czechia's largest energy company (70% सरकारी), operating coal, nuclear, and renewable power plants. Sev.en Energy — the largest private lignite खनन and power company. Sokolovská uhelná — operates lignite mines in the Sokolov basin.

ERÚ (Energetický regulační úřad / Energy Regulatory Office) — the independent ऊर्जा नियामक. Czech Coal Commission (Uhelná komise) — established to recommend a coal phase-out date. Recommended 2033, but implementation timelines remain debated.

Parlament České republiky — bicameral: Poslanecká sněmovna (200 members) and Senát (81 members). Contact through psp.cz and senat.cz. EU Just Transition Fund — Czechia is eligible for significant funding for coal-dependent regions.

DK.s: Advanced Nordic अर्थव्यवस्था ($424.5B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with global leadership in wind energy (Vestas, Ørsted). Intensive livestock agriculture (28M pigs for 5.8M people) creates significant nitrogen pollution. सेवाएँ 63.5% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. World's most ambitious climate law (70% reduction by 2030).

sectors.w: Denmark's intensive pig farming generates nitrogen pollution visible in marine dead zones (inner Danish waters, Baltic Sea). EU Nitrates Directive compliance data makes W computable from farm-level nitrogen balance sheets.
bp: सुधार करें agricultural subsidies to penalize nitrogen surplus per hectare. जब the अतिव्यापी हित between livestock producers and feed importers is broken by internalizing the nitrogen externality, intensive livestock becomes unprofitable without subsidy.

Mandatory farm-level nitrogen and phosphorus balance disclosure. Denmark already has one of Europe's most detailed agricultural data systems — extending to mandatory public disclosure makes W computable.

आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Intensive livestock inherently concentrates nutrients beyond ecosystem absorption. However, Denmark's leadership in biogas from manure demonstrates प्रणाली निर्भरता can be reduced through circular nutrient management.

Document animal welfare violations — report to Fødevarestyrelsen

i: Miljøstyrelsen — responsible for पर्यावरणीय regulation including agricultural उत्सर्जन and water quality. Fødevarestyrelsen (Danish Veterinary and Food Administration) — oversees food safety and animal welfare. Danish Whistleblower Act (2021) — transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937.
Danish Crown — one of Europe's largest meat processors (farmer cooperative). Arla Foods — multinational dairy cooperative headquartered in Denmark. DLG Group — major agricultural input cooperative.

Miljøministeriet (Ministry of Environment) — पर्यावरणीय policy including agricultural regulation. Landbrugsstyrelsen (Danish Agricultural Agency) — administers CAP payments. The 2021 green agriculture agreement is one of Europe's most ambitious.

Folketinget — unicameral parliament (179 members). Contact through ft.dk. Klimaloven (Climate Act, 2020) — legally binding 70% उत्सर्जन reduction target by 2030. HELCOM (Helsinki Commission) — the governing body of the Convention on the Protection of the Marine Environment of the Baltic Sea Area.

DO.s: Caribbean's largest अर्थव्यवस्था ($124.3B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with tourism, manufacturing (free trade zones), and खनन (2.04% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद — Pueblo Viejo gold mine, one of the world's largest). सेवाएँ 59.8% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Climate vulnerable — hurricanes and sea level rise.

sectors.w: Pueblo Viejo gold mine (Barrick Gold) generates cyanide and mercury contamination risks. जब प्रति खदान water quality and health data is published alongside production revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Mandate पर्यावरणीय bonds that fully internalize mine closure and remediation costs. जब खनन companies pre-fund cleanup, अतिव्यापी हित extraction without पर्यावरणीय accountability कमजोर होता है.
Mandatory water quality monitoring and health-impact disclosure per mine. Publishing downstream contamination data makes W computable from खनन revenue.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Open-pit खनन disturbs landscapes. However, improved tailings management and water treatment can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to the Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources
Document community health impacts — report to health authorities

i: Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales — the environment ministry. Dirección General de Minería — the खनन directorate under the Ministry of Energy and Mines. Defensor del Pueblo — the national ombudsman.
Barrick Gold — operates Pueblo Viejo, one of the world's largest gold mines (JV with Newmont). The mine produces ~800,000 ounces of gold annually.
Ministerio de Energía y Minas — oversees खनन policy. Ley 146-71 (Mining Law) — governs खनन concessions and पर्यावरणीय obligations.
Congreso Nacional — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (190 members) and Senado (32 members). The Dominican Republic is a presidential लोकतंत्र.

DZ.s: Major oil and gas producer ($269.3B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 22.46% combined oil and gas rents. Sonatrach is Africa's largest company. Economy heavily dependent on hydrocarbon exports (90%+ of export revenue). कृषि 14% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (primarily wheat and dates). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Algeria's oil production is declining from mature Hassi Messaoud and Hassi R'Mel fields. As domestic energy consumption grows (population of 45M+), the exportable surplus shrinks. जब production costs exceed export revenue minus domestic consumption, अतिव्यापी हित continued expansion breaks.
bp: Redirect hydrocarbon revenues to solar energy (Algeria has the Sahara — one of Earth's highest solar irradiance zones). जब solar electricity is cheaper than burning domestically-consumed gas, अतिव्यापी हित gas-fired power generation breaks.

कार्यान्वित करें प्रति क्षेत्र उत्सर्जन disclosure for Sonatrach operations. Algeria's massive gas flaring (visible from satellite) makes पर्यावरणीय damage measurable — publishing this data makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.

Document gas flaring data — report to Ministry of Energy and Mines

ARH: लागू करें flaring reduction regulations

i: Sonatrach — Algeria's state oil and gas company, Africa's largest company by revenue. Sonatrach controls all upstream and downstream petroleum operations. Note: Algeria has limited press freedom and no comprehensive मुखबिर protection. Independent reporting is constrained.
Sonatrach operates the world's longest natural gas pipelines (Transmed to Italy, MEG to Spain). Eni, TotalEnergies, Equinor, Occidental — major international partners in Algerian upstream operations.

ALNAFT (Agence Nationale pour la Valorisation des Ressources en Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons regulatory agency managing licensing. CREG (Commission de Régulation de l'Électricité et du Gaz) — the electricity and gas regulatory commission. ARH (Autorité de Régulation des Hydrocarbures) — the hydrocarbons sector regulator.

Note: Algeria is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The Assemblée populaire nationale (407 members) and Conseil de la Nation (174 members) do not function as independent democratic institutions. International channels: OPEC membership, Mediterranean dialogue (Union for the Mediterranean), African Union, Arab League. Algeria's strategic gas supply position (supplier to Italy, Spain via pipeline) gives it leverage in energy transition negotiations.

EC.s: Oil-dependent अर्थव्यवस्था ($124.7B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 6.41% oil rents. PetroEcuador manages state interests. Extraordinary biodiversity (Galápagos, Amazon basin). The 2008 Constitution grants 'rights of nature' (Pachamama). कृषि 9.5% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (bananas, shrimp, cacao).

sectors.w: Ecuador's 2023 referendum voted to ban oil extraction in Yasuní National Park (one of the world's most biodiverse areas). This democratic decision to forgo extraction directly breaks the अतिव्यापी हित. Extending this precedent to other sensitive areas accelerates the transition.
bp: कार्यान्वित करें the Yasuní referendum result (ban extraction in ITT block) and extend the precedent to other ecologically sensitive areas. जब democratic decisions override extraction interests, the अतिव्यापी हित breaks through civic action.

Mandate per-block पर्यावरणीय impact disclosure for all PetroEcuador and private operator fields. Ecuador's पर्यावरणीय data (Amazon वनों की कटाई, water contamination from legacy Texaco/Chevron operations) makes W measurable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ by conservation of mass.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to MAATE (Ministry of Environment, Water and Ecological Transition)
Document community health impacts from oil operations — report to the Defensoría del Pueblo
Use Ecuador's Constitutional protections for पर्यावरणीय defenders
PetroEcuador: विकसित करें transition plan to phase out operations in ecologically sensitive areas

में निवेश करें remediation of legacy contamination (Lago Agrio)

Leverage Ecuador's rights of nature framework in international climate negotiations
Support the Amazon Cooperation Treaty Organization (ACTO) for regional पर्यावरणीय governance

i: MAATE (Ministerio del Ambiente, Agua y Transición Ecológica) — Ecuador's environment ministry. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman. Ecuador's 2008 Constitution (Articles 71-74) grants legally enforceable rights to nature (Pachamama), a global first.

EP PetroEcuador — the state oil company. PetroAmazonas EP — manages upstream operations in the Amazon basin. The Lago Agrio case (Chevron/Texaco) — one of the world's largest पर्यावरणीय lawsuits over oil contamination in the Ecuadorian Amazon.
ARCERNNR (Agencia de Regulación y Control de Energía y Recursos Naturales No Renovables) — the energy and natural resources regulatory agency.

Asamblea Nacional del Ecuador — unicameral parliament (137 members). Contact through asambleanacional.gob.ec. Ecuador's rights of nature framework (2008 Constitution) and the 2023 Yasuní referendum are globally significant legal precedents for पर्यावरणीय governance.

EE.s: Advanced digital अर्थव्यवस्था ($43.1B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with unique oil shale dependence (0.96% oil rents from kukersite extraction). Services-dominant (65.7% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). EU and NATO member. World leader in e-governance. Oil shale power generation is Estonia's largest source of CO₂ उत्सर्जन.

sectors.w: Estonia's oil shale sector is concentrated in Ida-Viru county (Eesti Energia/Enefit). EU ETS carbon costs make oil shale electricity the most expensive fossil option. जब carbon pricing fully applies, the अतिव्यापी हित between shale operators and electricity consumers breaks.
bp: Full EU ETS alignment without compensation. Oil shale electricity already costs more than wind in the Baltic. जब subsidies and free allowances are eliminated, अतिव्यापी हित oil shale generation breaks — renewables are cheaper.
Mandatory प्रति संयंत्र lifecycle उत्सर्जन and health-impact disclosure for oil shale processing. Estonia's detailed पर्यावरणीय monitoring makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. Oil shale processing releases CO₂, particulate matter, and phenolic wastewater by physical and chemical process.

Document health impacts in Ida-Viru communities
Use Estonian मुखबिर law (rikkumisest teavitaja kaitse seadus, 2022)

i: Keskkonnaamet (Environmental Board) — Estonia's पर्यावरणीय enforcement and permitting authority. Keskkonnaministeerium (Ministry of the Environment) — oversees पर्यावरणीय policy. Estonia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

Eesti Energia (Enefit) — the सरकारी energy company and dominant oil shale operator. Enefit operates the Narva power plants (the largest oil shale power plants in the world) and oil shale processing facilities.
Konkurentsiamet (Competition Authority) — also serves as Estonia's ऊर्जा नियामक. Ida-Viru county hosts ~90% of Estonia's oil shale operations and faces significant economic transition challenges.

Riigikogu — Estonia's unicameral parliament (101 members). Contact through riigikogu.ee. Estonia's Climate Ambition target includes significant उत्सर्जन reduction from the energy sector. EU Just Transition Fund — Estonia receives JTF funding for Ida-Viru transition.

EG.s: Largest Arab अर्थव्यवस्था by population ($389.1B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Oil and gas rents at 5.04%. Major gas producer (Zohr field, Mediterranean). कृषि 13.7% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. High military expenditure. Hosted COP27. Suez Canal provides strategic global trade leverage.

sectors.w: Egypt's Zohr gas field (discovered 2015) transformed Egypt from gas importer to exporter. COP27 presidency created domestic pressure for उत्सर्जन पारदर्शिता. Per-field उत्सर्जन disclosure makes W computable.
bp: Redirect gas export revenue to solar energy development. Egypt's solar irradiance is among the world's highest. जब solar electricity undercuts gas-fired generation domestically, अतिव्यापी हित gas-for-domestic-power कमजोर होता है.

कार्यान्वित करें प्रति क्षेत्र उत्सर्जन disclosure for Zohr and other major fields. Egypt's COP27 commitments create institutional pressure — making lifecycle उत्सर्जन visible per unit of production makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

Document उत्सर्जन data through international partner channels (Eni, BP)
Report through EGPC internal compliance mechanisms

i: EEAA (Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency) — Egypt's पर्यावरणीय regulatory body. EGPC (Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil and gas company. EGAS (Egyptian Natural Gas Holding Company) — manages natural gas operations. Note: Egypt has severe restrictions on नागरिक समाज and press freedom. Whistleblower protections are minimal.
Eni — operates Zohr, the largest gas field in the Mediterranean. BP — major operator in the West Nile Delta. EGPC and EGAS manage state interests in all petroleum operations.

Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources — oversees hydrocarbons policy. NREA (New and Renewable Energy Authority) — responsible for नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा development. Egypt's Integrated Sustainable Energy Strategy targets 42% renewable electricity by 2035.

Note: Egypt under President el-Sisi is rated 'Not Free' by Freedom House. The House of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 596 members) does not function as an independent democratic institution. International channels: Arab League, African Union (Egypt hosted AU in 2019), Union for the Mediterranean, COP27 legacy initiatives.

ET.s: Africa's second-most-populous country ($149.7B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Agriculture dominates (34.8% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, primarily coffee, teff, livestock). Rapid industrialization drive (industrial parks). Major hydropower (GERD — Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam). Post-civil war recovery.

sectors.w: Ethiopia's agricultural expansion is the primary driver of वनों की कटाई (fr=5.6% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद equivalent in forest rents). जब per-farm पर्यावरणीय data (tree cover, soil carbon) is linked to agricultural output, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Scale Ethiopia's Productive Safety Net Program (PSNP) to include पर्यावरणीय conditionality. जब agricultural support payments require soil conservation and tree planting, अतिव्यापी हित clearing forest for short-term cultivation कमजोर होता है.

Satellite-based monitoring of forest cover and मिट्टी का क्षरण published at woreda level. Ethiopia's Green Legacy Initiative provides political commitment — mandatory monitoring data makes W computable.

आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Subsistence agriculture on degraded land inherently affects soil and water systems. However, Ethiopia's traditional conservation agriculture (terracing, agroforestry) can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report illegal वनों की कटाई to regional पर्यावरणीय protection authorities
Document land grabbing or forced displacement — report to EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission)
Report through agricultural development agent (DA) networks at kebele level
Ethiopian Commodity Exchange (ECX): Integrate पर्यावरणीय certification into coffee and sesame trading
Agricultural investment companies: अपनाएं पर्यावरणीय impact monitoring
Support Green Legacy Initiative reforestation targets
Ministry of Agriculture: सुधार करें the Productive Safety Net Program to include पर्यावरणीय conditionality
EFCCC: मजबूत करें forest protection enforcement
EIA (Ethiopian Investment Authority): Require पर्यावरणीय impact assessments for agricultural investment licenses
Support African Forest Landscape Restoration Initiative (AFR100) targets for Ethiopia
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: African Union (headquartered in Addis Ababa) for continental agricultural sustainability standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: international climate finance for Ethiopia's agricultural transformation
Support Nile Basin Initiative cooperation on sustainable watershed management
i: Regional पर्यावरणीय protection authorities — Ethiopia's federal system devolves पर्यावरणीय management to regional states. EHRC (Ethiopian Human Rights Commission) — the national human rights institution. विकसित करेंment Agents (DAs) — government agricultural extension workers deployed at kebele (ward) level throughout rural Ethiopia.

ECX (Ethiopian Commodity Exchange) — the commodities trading platform for coffee, sesame, and other agricultural products. Ethiopia is Africa's largest coffee producer and coffee is the country's largest export. Industrial parks development corporation — manages Ethiopia's growing manufacturing sector.

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy and the PSNP. EFCCC (Environment, Forest and Climate Change Commission) — Ethiopia's पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. Green Legacy Initiative — the government's flagship reforestation program targeting 20 billion seedlings.

Note: Ethiopia is a federal संसदीय republic but democratic governance has been constrained by civil conflict (Tigray war 2020-2022). The House of Peoples' Representatives (547 members) is the lower house. International channels: African Union (HQ in Addis Ababa), Nile Basin Initiative, IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on विकसित करेंment), AFR100 (Africa's contribution to the Bonn Challenge on forest restoration).

FI.s: Advanced Nordic अर्थव्यवस्था ($298.7B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with strong forestry sector. सेवाएँ 62.2% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, manufacturing at 14.2%. High healthcare expenditure (10.47% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Major pulp and paper producers (UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group). यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्य with robust पर्यावरणीय regulation.

sectors.w: Finland's forestry-driven monoculture (pine/spruce plantations replacing natural forests) reduces biodiversity and degrades peatland carbon stocks. जब per-harvest biodiversity and carbon data is published alongside timber revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: सुधार करें EU CAP and national forestry subsidies to reward biodiversity and carbon storage rather than timber volume. जब subsidies incentivize continuous-cover forestry over clear-cutting, अतिव्यापी हित plantation monoculture कमजोर होता है.

Mandatory per-harvest पर्यावरणीय data (biodiversity indicators, soil carbon, water quality). Finland's Metsähallitus (state forest enterprise) already collects extensive data — making it publicly accessible makes W computable.

आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Timber plantation inherently reduces biodiversity compared to natural forest. However, continuous-cover forestry and extended rotation lengths can significantly reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report forestry violations to ELY-keskus (Centre for Economic विकसित करेंment, Transport and the Environment)
Document biodiversity loss in logged areas — report to SYKE (Finnish Environment Institute)
Use Finnish मुखबिर law (ilmoittajansuojelulaki, 2023)
UPM, Stora Enso, Metsä Group: अपनाएं continuous-cover forestry targets
कार्यान्वित करें per-harvest biodiversity monitoring
में निवेश करें high-value wood products to reduce harvest volume dependency
MMM (Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry): सुधार करें the National Forest Strategy toward biodiversity targets
SYKE: Publish annual forest biodiversity monitoring data at municipality level
मजबूत करें EU Nature Restoration Law implementation in forestry sector
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: member of the Eduskunta की मांग करने के लिए reform of forestry subsidies toward biodiversity and carbon storage
Support EU Nature Restoration Law implementation
Advocate for HELCOM enforcement on Baltic Sea eutrophication from forestry runoff
के लिए दबाव डालें: inclusion of forestry carbon accounting in Finland's climate targets
i: ELY-keskus — regional authorities responsible for पर्यावरणीय monitoring and enforcement. SYKE (Suomen ympäristökeskus / Finnish Environment Institute) — the national पर्यावरणीय research and monitoring institute. Ilmoittajansuojelulaki (Whistleblower Protection Act, 2023) — Finnish transposition of EU Whistleblower Directive.

UPM-Kymmene — one of Finland's largest forestry companies. Stora Enso — Finnish-Swedish forestry and paper company. Metsä Group — cooperative of 100,000+ Finnish forest owners. Metsähallitus — state enterprise managing one-third of Finland's land area.

MMM (Maa- ja metsätalousministeriö) — the ministry responsible for agriculture and forestry policy. National Forest Strategy 2025 — Finland's strategic framework for forestry sector development. EU Nature Restoration Law — requires restoration of degraded ecosystems including forests.

Eduskunta (Parliament of Finland) — unicameral legislature with 200 members. Contact through eduskunta.fi. The Maa- ja metsätalousvaliokunta (Agriculture and Forestry Committee) handles forestry legislation. Finland's climate law targets carbon neutrality by 2035.

GA.s: Oil-dependent Central African अर्थव्यवस्था ($20.9B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 15.83% combined oil and gas rents. 88% forest cover — one of the world's most forested countries. Low population (2.4M). Military coup August 2023 ended the Bongo family's 55-year rule.

sectors.w: Gabon's oil production is in terminal decline from mature fields (peaked at ~370,000 bpd in 1997, now ~200,000). As production falls, the अतिव्यापी हित between operators and government revenue कमजोर होता है. Gabon's forests offer alternative revenue through carbon credits.
bp: Monetize Gabon's forest carbon stocks through REDD+ and voluntary carbon markets. Gabon received $17M from Norway for forest protection in 2021 — scaling this replaces declining oil revenue and breaks अतिव्यापी हित extraction.
कार्यान्वित करें प्रति क्षेत्र उत्सर्जन disclosure for all operators (TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala Energy). Making पर्यावरणीय costs visible makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to ANPN (Agence Nationale des Parcs Nationaux)
Document oil spills or contamination — report through operator compliance channels
को रिपोर्ट करें: EITI Gabon
TotalEnergies, Perenco, Assala: कार्यान्वित करें उत्सर्जन reduction plans for Gabonese operations
GOC: विकसित करें forest carbon credit revenue streams
अपनाएं biodiversity offset requirements for all operations
Ministry of Hydrocarbons: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय licensing requirements
ANPN: लागू करें protected area boundaries against oil exploration
EITI Gabon: Expand reporting to पर्यावरणीय metrics
Support CAFI (Central African Forest Initiative) for Gabon's forest conservation
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: OPEC for managed production decline from depleting fields
के लिए दबाव डालें: international carbon market standards that properly value Gabon's forest carbon
Support transition governance toward पर्यावरणीय पारदर्शिता
i: ANPN (Agence Nationale des Parcs Nationaux) — manages Gabon's 13 national parks (covering 11% of territory). GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company. EITI Gabon — member since 2004. Note: Gabon is under military transition government since August 2023 coup.
TotalEnergies — the largest oil producer in Gabon. Perenco, Assala Energy — other major operators. GOC (Gabon Oil Company) — the state oil company.
Ministry of Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas policy. DGEPN (Direction Générale de l'Environnement et de la Protection de la Nature) — पर्यावरणीय directorate.

Note: Gabon is under military transition government (Comité pour la Transition et la Restauration des Institutions, CTRI) since August 2023. Democratic institutions are suspended. International channels: CEMAC, CAFI, African Union, OPEC membership. Gabon's 2021 deal with Norway's sovereign wealth fund for forest protection is a model for forest-state climate finance.

GE.s: Small South Caucasus अर्थव्यवस्था ($34.2B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with खनन sector (1.28% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, primarily manganese and copper). Services-dominant (62% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). यूरोपीय संघ उम्मीदवार country (2023). Significant hydropower potential. Political tensions between pro-EU and pro-Russia orientations.

sectors.w: Georgia's manganese खनन (Chiatura) and copper खनन generate significant water pollution. EU accession पर्यावरणीय alignment will require improved monitoring. जब water quality data is linked to खनन output, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: EU accession पर्यावरणीय alignment. जब Georgia must meet EU पर्यावरणीय standards for खनन, अतिव्यापी हित low-cost extraction without पर्यावरणीय controls कमजोर होता है.
Mandatory प्रति खदान water quality and उत्सर्जन disclosure. Georgia's National Environmental Agency collects some data — extending to public disclosure makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining disturbs landscapes, but improved tailings management can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to the Environmental Information and Education Centre
Document water contamination — report to NEA (National Environmental Agency)
Use Georgia's मुखबिर protection mechanisms
Georgian Manganese (Euroasian Resources Group subsidiary): कार्यान्वित करें पर्यावरणीय management systems
अपनाएं international खनन standards (ICMM, IRMA)
में निवेश करें mine site rehabilitation
NAPR (National Agency of Public Registry): मजबूत करें खनन license पर्यावरणीय conditions
NEA: Increase पर्यावरणीय monitoring capacity
Ministry of Economy: Align खनन regulation with EU पर्यावरणीय acquis
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: member of the Sakartvelos Parlamenti (Parliament of Georgia) की मांग करने के लिए EU-aligned पर्यावरणीय standards for खनन
Support EU accession conditionality on पर्यावरणीय governance
Advocate for Energy Community Treaty enforcement on पर्यावरणीय standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: EITI membership for Georgia
i: NEA (National Environmental Agency) — responsible for पर्यावरणीय monitoring, permitting, and enforcement. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Agriculture — oversees पर्यावरणीय and agricultural policy. Georgia's Law on Freedom of Speech and Expression provides some protections for reporting.

Georgian Manganese — subsidiary of ERG (Eurasian Resources Group), operating the Chiatura manganese mines. RMG Copper — operates copper mines. Georgia's खनन sector is primarily controlled by international investors.
National Agency of Mines — responsible for खनन licensing and oversight. Georgia's EU Association Agreement (2014) includes provisions for पर्यावरणीय alignment.

Sakartvelos Parlamenti (Parliament of Georgia) — unicameral legislature with 150 members. Contact through parliament.ge. Georgia is an यूरोपीय संघ उम्मीदवार country (2023) and aspirant to full यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्यship. EU Association Agreement — includes Deep and Comprehensive Free Trade Area (DCFTA) with पर्यावरणीय provisions.

GH.s: West African अर्थव्यवस्था ($82.3B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with significant oil (4.06% rents), gold खनन (5.17% mineral rents), and cocoa agriculture (20.9% ag share). One of Africa's most stable democracies. Debt crisis (2022 IMF bailout). Illegal artisanal gold खनन (galamsey) is a major पर्यावरणीय crisis.

sectors.w: Ghana's galamsey (illegal artisanal खनन) crisis has contaminated water bodies across cocoa-growing regions. जब प्रति खदान water quality data is published and linked to gold production, W गणनीय हो जाता है. The galamsey problem is so severe that it threatens Ghana's water supply.
bp: Formalize artisanal खनन with पर्यावरणीय standards and alternative livelihood programs. जब legal small-scale खनन provides comparable income with less पर्यावरणीय damage, अतिव्यापी हित illegal extraction कमजोर होता है.
Satellite-based water quality monitoring linked to खनन areas. Ghana's Water Resources Commission already monitors water quality — extending to real-time public data makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining disturbs landscapes. However, formalized artisanal खनन with mercury-free processing (e.g., gravity separation) can significantly reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report illegal galamsey operations to the Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining (IMCIM)
Document water contamination — report to WRC (Water Resources Commission)
Report through the Minerals Commission complaint mechanisms
Gold Fields, Newmont, AngloGold Ashanti: Support formalization of artisanal खनन near concessions
कार्यान्वित करें community development agreements per Ghana's खनन law
अपनाएं mercury-free processing technology transfer programs
Minerals Commission: Accelerate small-scale खनन formalization with पर्यावरणीय standards
EPA (Environmental Protection Agency): मजबूत करें enforcement against water pollution from खनन
Forestry Commission: Protect forest reserves from galamsey encroachment
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Member of Parliament की मांग करने के लिए emergency action on the galamsey water contamination crisis
Support EITI enhanced reporting with पर्यावरणीय metrics
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: ECOWAS for regional artisanal खनन regulation
के लिए दबाव डालें: Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury use in gold खनन
i: IMCIM (Inter-Ministerial Committee on Illegal Mining) — established to coordinate government response to the galamsey crisis. WRC (Water Resources Commission) — manages Ghana's water resources and monitors water quality. Minerals Commission — the regulatory body for the खनन sector, responsible for licensing and compliance monitoring.
Gold Fields — operates Tarkwa and Damang mines. Newmont — operates Ahafo and Akyem mines. AngloGold Ashanti — major gold खनन company with Ghanaian operations. Ghana is Africa's largest gold producer.

EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Ghana) — responsible for पर्यावरणीय permitting, monitoring, and enforcement. Forestry Commission — manages Ghana's forest reserves, many of which are threatened by illegal खनन. EITI Ghana — Ghana has been EITI compliant since 2010.

Parliament of Ghana — unicameral legislature with 275 members. Contact through parliament.gh. Ghana is a presidential लोकतंत्र with peaceful transfers of power. Minamata Convention on Mercury — Ghana has ratified this treaty requiring phase-down of mercury use in artisanal gold खनन.

GN.s: Resource-rich West African अर्थव्यवस्था ($25B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with massive bauxite reserves (world's largest — 7.4B tons). कृषि 31% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Military junta since 2021 coup. Guinea supplies ~25% of global bauxite (the ore used to produce aluminum).

sectors.w: Guinea's bauxite खनन displaces communities and contaminates water sources. As aluminum buyers face ESG pressure (EU CSRD, Apple/Tesla supply chain requirements), making प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय data visible breaks system independence.
bp: International supply chain due diligence (EU CSDDD) requiring पर्यावरणीय and human rights compliance for bauxite. जब buyers must verify mine-level conditions, अतिव्यापी हित low-cost, unregulated extraction कमजोर होता है.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय and community impact disclosure through EITI and supply chain traceability. जब downstream manufacturers can see the welfare cost per ton of bauxite, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Open-pit bauxite खनन inherently disturbs landscapes. However, progressive rehabilitation and dust suppression can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to international monitoring organizations (Human Rights Watch, Inclusive विकसित करेंment International)
Document community displacement — report through international accountability mechanisms
Report through खनन company compliance channels (Rio Tinto, Alcoa, Emirates Global Aluminium)
CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée), SMB (Société Minière de Boké): कार्यान्वित करें community resettlement standards per IFC Performance Standard 5
अपनाएं ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) certification
में निवेश करें progressive rehabilitation of mined areas
Ministry of Mines: लागू करें 2011 Mining Code पर्यावरणीय provisions
CPDM (Centre de Promotion et de Développement Minier): मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय monitoring capacity
EITI Guinea: Expand reporting to पर्यावरणीय and community data
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: ECOWAS for return to democratic governance and strengthened खनन regulation
Support EU CSDDD implementation requiring due diligence for bauxite imports from Guinea
के लिए दबाव डालें: ASI certification as condition for international bauxite purchases
Support international accountability mechanisms for खनन-affected communities
i: Note: Guinea is under military rule (CNRD — Comité National du Rassemblement et du Développement) since September 2021. Independent नागरिक समाज operates under severe constraints. Bureau Guinéen des Études et Évaluations Environnementales (BGEEE) — पर्यावरणीय assessment authority. International monitoring: Human Rights Watch and Inclusive विकसित करेंment International have documented impacts of bauxite खनन on Guinean communities.

CBG (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinée) — JV of Alcoa, Rio Tinto, and Dadco, one of the world's largest bauxite producers. SMB (Société Minière de Boké) — Chinese-backed consortium (includes Winning International, Shandong Weiqiao). GAC (Guinea Alumina Corporation) — Emirates Global Aluminium subsidiary. ASI (Aluminium Stewardship Initiative) — the industry sustainability standard for the aluminum value chain.

Ministère des Mines et de la Géologie — oversees खनन policy and licensing. Code Minier (2011, revised 2013) — Guinea's खनन code establishing पर्यावरणीय obligations. EITI Guinea — Guinea has been EITI compliant, publishing reports on खनन revenues.

Note: Guinea's democratic institutions are suspended under military rule. The Conseil National de la Transition (CNT) serves as a transitional legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Guinea suspended), African Union, international खनन company home-country oversight (UK, Canada, UAE, China). EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD) — will require EU companies to address human rights and पर्यावरणीय impacts in their supply chains.

GQ.s: Small petrostate ($12.8B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 21.57% combined oil and gas rents. One of Africa's highest per-capita सकल घरेलू उत्पादs but extreme inequality. Authoritarian rule (Obiang family since 1979 — world's longest-serving head of state). Oil production declining from mature fields.

sectors.w: Equatorial Guinea's oil production has declined ~75% from peak. As fields deplete, the अतिव्यापी हित between operators and government revenue कमजोर होता है. Without new discoveries, the economic case for diversification becomes unavoidable.
bp: Economic diversification as oil depletes. जब production revenue falls below government operating costs, अतिव्यापी हित continued extraction from depleting fields breaks — alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-field उत्सर्जन disclosure through international operator reporting (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil). Making पर्यावरणीय costs visible makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through international operator compliance channels (ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil)
Document पर्यावरणीय violations to international NGOs
Report corruption to US DOJ (several Obiang family members have faced kleptocracy investigations)
ExxonMobil, Marathon Oil: Apply global पर्यावरणीय standards to EG operations
Report Scope 1-3 उत्सर्जन for EG operations in global ESG disclosures
कार्यान्वित करें community development programs
Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons: Publish production and revenue data through EITI (EG was suspended from EITI in 2010)
मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय standards for offshore operations
BEAC: Improve fiscal पारदर्शिता for hydrocarbon revenues
Support international anti-kleptocracy enforcement for misappropriated oil revenues
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: CEMAC for regional पारदर्शिता standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: re-engagement with EITI पारदर्शिता requirements
Support international mechanisms for asset recovery and repatriation of stolen oil revenues
i: Note: Equatorial Guinea is one of the world's most सत्तावादी states. No independent media, नागरिक समाज, or labor organizations exist. EG LNG (Equatorial Guinea LNG Holdings) — operates the LNG processing plant. International engagement: US Department of Justice Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Initiative has investigated Obiang family assets. Transparency International consistently ranks Equatorial Guinea among the most corrupt countries.
ExxonMobil — the largest oil operator in Equatorial Guinea. Marathon Oil — operates in offshore blocks. GEPetrol — the state national oil company.

Ministry of Mines and Hydrocarbons — oversees oil and gas operations. Note: Equatorial Guinea was suspended from EITI in 2010 for insufficient progress on पारदर्शिता. BEAC (central bank of CEMAC zone) provides limited macroeconomic oversight.

Note: Equatorial Guinea under President Obiang (in power since 1979) has no democratic institutions. The Cámara de Representantes del Pueblo and Senate are rubber-stamp bodies. International channels: CEMAC, African Union, UN Human Rights Council. Several countries (US, France, Switzerland) have pursued legal action against Obiang family members for corruption and money laundering.

GR.s: EU अर्थव्यवस्था ($256.2B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with dominant services sector (68% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, tourism-heavy). Low resource extraction. Post-debt-crisis recovery. Major shipping industry (Greek-owned fleet is the world's largest). कृषि 3.8% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (olives, wine).

sectors.w: Greece's Mediterranean diet is being displaced by UPF consumption, contributing to rising obesity (Greece has one of Europe's highest childhood obesity rates). जब diet-related healthcare costs are published per product category through EOPYY health insurance data, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: कार्यान्वित करें front-of-pack health labelling to make welfare costs visible to consumers. जब UPF health costs are visible at point of sale, the अतिव्यापी हित between processors and retailers in high-margin UPF कमजोर होता है.

EOPYY (National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) publication of diet-attributable disease costs per food category. Greece's national health system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. सुधार करेंulation mandates can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report misleading health claims to EFET (Hellenic Food Authority)
Document food safety violations
Use Greek मुखबिर law (transposition of EU Directive 2019/1937, 2022)
Greek food companies: में निवेश करें traditional Mediterranean diet products over UPF
अपनाएं voluntary front-of-pack labelling
Commission health-impact assessments
Ministry of Health: कार्यान्वित करें mandatory front-of-pack labelling
EFET: मजबूत करें enforcement of marketing claims
EOPYY: Publish diet-related health expenditure data
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Βουλευτής in the Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) की मांग करने के लिए front-of-pack health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy implementation
Advocate for UNESCO Intangible Heritage protection of Mediterranean diet through policy measures
के लिए दबाव डालें: WHO-aligned UPF marketing restrictions
i: EFET (ΕΦΕΤ — Ενιαίος Φορέας Ελέγχου Τροφίμων / Hellenic Food Authority) — Greece's food safety authority. Greece transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.

SEVT (Σύνδεσμος Ελληνικών Βιομηχανιών Τροφίμων / Federation of Hellenic Food Industries) — the food industry trade association. Greece's traditional food sector (olive oil, dairy, honey) provides a competitive alternative to UPF.

Ministry of Health — oversees health policy. EOPYY (Εθνικός Οργανισμός Παροχής Υπηρεσιών Υγείας / National Organization for the Provision of Healthcare Services) — the national health insurer managing healthcare expenditure data.
Βουλή των Ελλήνων (Hellenic Parliament) — unicameral legislature with 300 members. Contact through hellenicparliament.gr. Greece is a संसदीय लोकतंत्र and यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्य.

GT.s: Central American अर्थव्यवस्था ($113.2B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with agriculture at 9.8% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (coffee, sugar, palm oil). Mining at 1.12% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (gold, silver — Marlin mine controversy). High inequality and indigenous population (40%+). Remittances significant (~18% of सकल घरेलू उत्पाद).

sectors.w: Guatemala's palm oil expansion into Petén and Alta Verapaz drives वनों की कटाई and displaces indigenous communities. जब per-farm वनों की कटाई data is linked to palm oil exports (EUDR compliance), W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: EU Deforestation Regulation compliance requiring farm-level traceability. जब palm oil exports must prove zero-वनों की कटाई origin, अतिव्यापी हित clearing forest for plantations breaks.

Mandatory per-farm पर्यावरणीय data (tree cover, water use, pesticide application). Guatemala's CONAP (National Council for Protected Areas) can provide monitoring data — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. However, agroforestry integration and RSPO certification can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report illegal वनों की कटाई to CONAP or INAB (National Forest Institute)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos)
Report pesticide violations to MAGA (Ministry of Agriculture)
Palm oil companies (REPSA, NaturAceites): अपनाएं RSPO certification and zero-वनों की कटाई commitments
International buyers: Require supply chain traceability for Guatemalan palm oil
में निवेश करें community benefit-sharing agreements
MARN (Ministry of Environment): मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय impact assessment for agricultural expansion
MAGA: सुधार करें agricultural incentives to require पर्यावरणीय compliance
CONAP: लागू करें protected area boundaries against agricultural encroachment
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Diputado in the Congreso de la República की मांग करने के लिए enforcement of पर्यावरणीय protections for indigenous territories
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
के लिए दबाव डालें: EUDR compliance support for small-scale farmers
i: CONAP (Consejo Nacional de Áreas Protegidas) — manages Guatemala's protected areas. INAB (Instituto Nacional de Bosques) — the national forest institute. PDH (Procuraduría de los Derechos Humanos) — the national human rights ombudsman. Guatemala has significant challenges with पर्यावरणीय defender safety.

REPSA (Reforestadora de Palma del Petén) — major palm oil producer. GREPALMA (Gremial de Palmicultores de Guatemala) — the palm oil producers' association. RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable ताड़ का तेल) — the international certification standard.
MARN (Ministerio de Ambiente y Recursos Naturales) — Guatemala's environment ministry. MAGA (Ministerio de Agricultura, Ganadería y Alimentación) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso de la República de Guatemala — unicameral legislature with 160 members. Guatemala has ratified ILO Convention 169 on indigenous peoples' rights. The Inter-American Court of Human Rights has issued rulings on indigenous land rights in Guatemala.

GY.s: Fastest-growing अर्थव्यवस्था globally ($24.7B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, up from $5.5B in 2019) due to massive offshore oil discoveries (Stabroek block). तेल किराया at 22.08%, खनन at 9.38% (gold, bauxite). Small population (800K). At risk of 'resource curse' — extraordinary PST exposure from rapid petro-development.

sectors.w: Guyana's 2016 production sharing agreement with ExxonMobil has been widely criticized for giving the government only 2% royalty + 50% profit oil (after cost recovery). जब the full fiscal terms and पर्यावरणीय costs are disclosed and understood, W गणनीय हो जाता है from production data.
bp: Renegotiate the Stabroek PSA fiscal terms to capture a fair share of petroleum wealth. जब Guyana's government share approaches international norms (60-80% government take), अतिव्यापी हित an extractive-favorable contract कमजोर होता है.

Mandatory प्रति क्षेत्र उत्सर्जन disclosure and पर्यावरणीय monitoring for all Stabroek block operations. ExxonMobil already reports global उत्सर्जन — extending to प्रति क्षेत्र Guyana data makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता by policy alone. Offshore oil production and combustion release CO₂.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations to EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana)
Document compliance gaps in Stabroek operations — report through ExxonMobil compliance channels
Report fiscal irregularities to the Audit Office of Guyana
ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC (Stabroek partners): कार्यान्वित करें प्रति क्षेत्र उत्सर्जन disclosure for Guyana operations
अपनाएं zero-flaring targets
में निवेश करें oil spill response capacity (current capacity is minimal for deepwater operations)
EPA: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय monitoring capacity for offshore operations
Ministry of Natural Resources: Commission independent review of Stabroek PSA terms
Natural Resource Fund Board: कार्यान्वित करें transparent investment and withdrawal rules
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Member of Parliament in the National Assembly की मांग करने के लिए independent review of Stabroek PSA fiscal terms
Support establishment of a properly resourced Petroleum Commission as independent regulator
Advocate for Natural Resource Fund पारदर्शिता aligned with Santiago Principles for sovereign wealth funds
के लिए दबाव डालें: Norwegian-style petroleum governance model with high government take and transparent wealth fund management
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency of Guyana) — responsible for पर्यावरणीय permitting and monitoring of oil and gas operations. Ministry of Natural Resources — oversees petroleum policy. Audit Office of Guyana — conducts financial audits of government revenue management. Note: Guyana's regulatory capacity is severely under-resourced relative to the scale of oil development.

ExxonMobil (45%), Hess (30%), CNOOC (25%) — the Stabroek block partnership. Production began in 2019 and is expected to reach 1.2 million bpd by 2027. The Stabroek Production Sharing Agreement (2016) — governs fiscal terms. The Natural Resource Fund — Guyana's sovereign wealth fund established in 2019 to manage oil revenues.
Natural Resource Fund Act (2021) — governs the sovereign wealth fund. The Petroleum Commission (planned) — intended to serve as the independent petroleum regulator, but not yet fully established.

National Assembly of Guyana — unicameral legislature with 65 members. Guyana is a cooperative republic with Westminster-style संसदीय लोकतंत्र. The Natural Resource Governance Institute (NRGI) provides technical assistance on petroleum governance. CARICOM — provides regional coordination.
