अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: deputy in the Saeima की मांग करने के लिए health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork
i: PVD (Pārtikas un veterinārais dienests) — food and veterinary authority. Latvia transposed EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Major companies: Rīgas Piena kombināts, Latvijas Balzams.
NVD (Nacionālais veselības dienests / National Health Service) — manages health insurance.
Saeima — unicameral parliament, 100 members. Contact through saeima.lv.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The अतिव्यापी हित is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. जब oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), अतिव्यापी हित capturing oil infrastructure कमजोर होता है.
NOC प्रति क्षेत्र production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to पर्यावरणीय data makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: Report through NOC internal channels
Provide data to international monitoring (UN Panel of Experts on Libya)
को रिपोर्ट करें: Libyan Audit Bureau
NOC: Maintain operational independence from factional politics
International partners (Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol): Apply global ESG standards to Libyan operations
कार्यान्वित करें उत्सर्जन monitoring
NOC: कार्यान्वित करें transparent revenue management
CBL (Central Bank of Libya): Unify financial management of oil revenues
Audit Bureau: Expand पर्यावरणीय auditing
Support UN-facilitated governance dialogue including oil revenue-sharing framework
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: African Union for stabilization with पर्यावरणीय governance
के लिए दबाव डालें: international monitoring of Libyan oil revenue flows
Support EITI candidacy for Libya as part of governance reform
i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors प्रतिबंध compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African अर्थव्यवस्था ($160.6B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with agriculture at 10.6% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद and growing नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). विनिर्माण 15.3% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate खनन generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. जब प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय data is published alongside production revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. जब OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, अतिव्यापी हित low-cost extraction कमजोर होता है.

Mandatory प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable प्रति खदान data makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: the Secrétariat d'État chargé du Développement Durable
Document water impacts — report to ABH (Agence du Bassin Hydraulique)
Report through OCP compliance channels
OCP: Expand water recycling and desalination for खनन operations
में निवेश करें cadmium removal technology
अपनाएं प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय impact reporting
Ministry of Energy and Mines: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय licensing for phosphate operations
ONEE (Office National de l'Électricité et de l'Eau Potable): Monitor water impacts
Department of Environment: लागू करें cadmium disposal standards
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: member of the Chambre des Représentants की मांग करने के लिए water-neutral खनन requirements
Support African Fertilizer and Soil Health Summit commitments on sustainable phosphate use
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: Union for the Mediterranean for पर्यावरणीय standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: international cadmium limits in fertilizer trade (Codex Alimentarius)
i: Secrétariat d'État chargé du Développement Durable — oversees पर्यावरणीय policy. ABH — river basin agencies managing water resources. OCP Group — the सरकारी phosphate company, one of Morocco's largest employers.
OCP Group (Office Chérifien des Phosphates) — सरकारी, controls ~30% of global phosphate trade. OCP has invested heavily in sustainability initiatives including the Mohammed VI Polytechnic University.
Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees खनन and पर्यावरणीय policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a संवैधानिक राजतंत्र with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest सकल घरेलू उत्पाद per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

sectors.w: Monaco's financial services facilitate wealth management with favorable tax treatment. जब beneficial ownership and tax पारदर्शिता data are published, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Full compliance with OECD Global Forum पारदर्शिता standards and CRS information exchange. जब opacity is eliminated, the अतिव्यापी हित कमजोर होता है.
Publication of aggregate beneficial ownership and capital flow data. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Financial services can relocate but Monaco's brand and geographic advantages create switching costs.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: SICCFIN (Service d'Information et de Contrôle sur les Circuits Financiers)
को रिपोर्ट करें: CCAF (Commission de Contrôle des Activités Financières)
Use internal compliance channels
Banks: कार्यान्वित करें enhanced CRS compliance
अपनाएं full beneficial ownership पारदर्शिता
Integrate ESG into wealth management
CCAF: मजबूत करें AML enforcement
SICCFIN: Enhance suspicious transaction monitoring
Government: Align with EU पारदर्शिता standards
Engage through the Conseil National (24 members) on financial पारदर्शिता legislation
Support OECD Global Forum recommendations
Align with EU AMLD standards through bilateral agreements
Support Moneyval evaluations
i: SICCFIN — Monaco's financial intelligence unit. CCAF — the financial activities supervisory commission.
Monaco hosts branches of major international banks. Association Monégasque des Activités Financières (AMAF) — the financial industry association.
CCAF — Monaco's financial regulator. Monaco is not an यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्य but has a customs union with France and cooperates on financial regulation.
Conseil National — Monaco's unicameral parliament, 24 members. Monaco is a संवैधानिक राजतंत्र (Prince Albert II). Moneyval (Council of Europe) evaluates Monaco's AML framework.

MD.s: Small Eastern European अर्थव्यवस्था ($18.2B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). कृषि 7.1% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (wine, agriculture). सेवाएँ 62.3%. यूरोपीय संघ उम्मीदवार country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

sectors.w: Moldova's agricultural sector is dominated by grain monoculture on degraded chernozem soils. जब soil health data is linked to agricultural output, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: EU accession agricultural alignment — CAP-style पर्यावरणीय conditionality. जब subsidies reward soil health, अतिव्यापी हित exhaustive monoculture कमजोर होता है.
Mandatory soil health monitoring per farm. Moldova's fertile chernozem soils are degrading — making this visible makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: Environmental Agency
Document मिट्टी का क्षरण — report through ACSA (Agency for Intervention and Payments in Agriculture)
Agricultural companies: अपनाएं crop rotation and cover cropping
में निवेश करें soil health measurement
Target EU market standards ahead of accession
Ministry of Agriculture: सुधार करें subsidies toward पर्यावरणीय conditionality
Environmental Agency: मजबूत करें soil monitoring
कार्यान्वित करें EU CAP-alignment measures
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: deputy in the Parlamentul Republicii Moldova (101 members) की मांग करने के लिए soil health legislation
Support EU accession पर्यावरणीय alignment
Advocate for agricultural transition support through EU pre-accession assistance
i: Environmental Agency — पर्यावरणीय monitoring. ACSA — manages agricultural payments.
Moldova's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders and medium enterprises.
Ministry of Agriculture and Food Industry — oversees agricultural policy.
Parlamentul Republicii Moldova — unicameral, 101 members. Contact through parlament.md. Moldova is an यूरोपीय संघ उम्मीदवार country.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot अर्थव्यवस्था ($17.4B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). कृषि 22.5% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating वनों की कटाई (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

sectors.w: Madagascar's slash-and-burn agriculture (tavy) has destroyed 90%+ of original forest. जब वनों की कटाई data is linked to agricultural output, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. जब tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, अतिव्यापी हित forest clearing breaks.
Satellite वनों की कटाई monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
Extreme प्रणाली निर्भरता. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.
a: Report illegal वनों की कटाई to Madagascar National Parks (MNP)
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: international conservation organizations (WWF, Conservation International)
Report rosewood trafficking to CITES authorities
Mining companies (Rio Tinto/QMM, Ambatovy): कार्यान्वित करें biodiversity offsets
Vanilla and clove exporters: अपनाएं sustainable sourcing certification
International buyers: Require वनों की कटाई-free supply chains
Ministry of Environment: लागू करें protected area boundaries
Ministry of Agriculture: Support agroforestry transition
ONE (Office National pour l'Environnement): मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय impact assessment
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Député in the Assemblée nationale (151 members) की मांग करने के लिए enforcement of the Forest Code
Support REDD+ climate finance for Madagascar's forests
Advocate for CITES enforcement on rosewood trafficking
के लिए दबाव डालें: international biodiversity finance through GEF and Green Climate Fund
i: MNP (Madagascar National Parks) — manages protected areas. WWF, Conservation International, WCS — major international conservation organizations with Madagascar programs.
QMM (QIT Madagascar Minerals, Rio Tinto subsidiary) — ilmenite खनन. Ambatovy — nickel and cobalt mine (Sumitomo). Madagascar is the world's largest vanilla producer.
ONE (Office National pour l'Environnement) — the पर्यावरणीय assessment authority. MEEF (Ministère de l'Environnement et de l'Écologie et des Forêts) — environment ministry.
Assemblée nationale de Madagascar — 151 members. Sénat — 18 members. Madagascar is a semi-presidential republic.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan अर्थव्यवस्था ($17B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). विनिर्माण 14.3% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. सेवाएँ 56.2%. यूरोपीय संघ उम्मीदवार country. Coal-dependent energy. कृषि 6.1% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद.

sectors.w: North Macedonia's lignite dependence (Bitola power plant) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make coal uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring ETS alignment. Coal becomes uncompetitive at EU carbon prices.
Per-plant उत्सर्जन and health cost disclosure. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. Coal combustion releases pollutants.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning
Document air pollution health impacts
ESM (Elektrani na Severna Makedonija): विकसित करें coal phase-out plan
में निवेश करें solar energy (excellent potential)
ERC: सुधार करें tariffs to reflect पर्यावरणीय costs
Energy Community Secretariat: लागू करें पर्यावरणीय compliance
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Пратеник in the Sobranie (120 members) की मांग करने के लिए coal phase-out timeline
Support EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession assistance
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: Energy Community for transition support
i: Ministry of Environment and Physical Planning — पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. North Macedonia is an Energy Community member.
ESM — state electricity company operating the Bitola lignite plant.
ERC (Energy Regulatory Commission) — ऊर्जा नियामक. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU energy acquis alignment.
Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. यूरोपीय संघ उम्मीदवार country.

ML.s: Sahelian अर्थव्यवस्था ($26.8B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with gold खनन (16.18% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) and agriculture (33.3% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold खनन generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). जब पर्यावरणीय data is published alongside production, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: International supply chain due diligence requiring mine-level पर्यावरणीय compliance. जब buyers verify conditions, अतिव्यापी हित unregulated extraction कमजोर होता है.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal खनन प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report through international खनन company channels (Barrick Gold, B2Gold)
को रिपोर्ट करें: DNGM (Direction Nationale de la Géologie et des Mines)
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: international monitoring organizations
Barrick Gold (Loulo-Gounkoto), B2Gold (Fekola): कार्यान्वित करें international पर्यावरणीय standards
Support artisanal खनन formalization
अपनाएं EITI enhanced reporting
Ministry of Mines: लागू करें Mining Code पर्यावरणीय provisions
DNGM: Improve artisanal खनन oversight
EITI Mali: Expand to पर्यावरणीय data
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: African Union for return to democratic governance with खनन पारदर्शिता
Support ECOWAS engagement on governance and पर्यावरणीय standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal खनन
Support international खनन company home-country oversight
i: DNGM — national geological and खनन directorate. Note: Mali is under military rule (CNSP). Civil society space is restricted.
Barrick Gold — operates Loulo-Gounkoto complex. B2Gold — operates Fekola mine. Resolute Mining — operates Syama mine. EITI Mali — member since 2006.
Ministry of Mines, Energy and Water — oversees खनन policy. Mali's 2019 Mining Code establishes पर्यावरणीय obligations.
Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich अर्थव्यवस्था ($74.1B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) under military junta since 2021 coup. गैस किराया 4.4%. Jade and gem खनन (est. $31B/year — more than formal सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). कृषि 20.8% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. जब jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: International प्रतिबंध targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. जब revenue is blocked, the अतिव्यापी हित between the military and jade खनन कमजोर होता है.
Supply chain पारदर्शिता for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (Global Witness, Justice for Myanmar)
Document military revenue flows from jade and gems
Provide data to international प्रतिबंध authorities
International gem buyers: Require provenance verification excluding military-linked mines
Jewelers (Tiffany, Cartier): अपनाएं Myanmar jade sourcing policies aligned with OECD Due Diligence Guidance
Apply conflict mineral frameworks to jade and gems
International प्रतिबंध authorities: Expand targeted प्रतिबंध on military खनन revenues
OECD: Include jade in conflict mineral due diligence guidance
Responsible Jewellery Council: मजबूत करें Myanmar sourcing standards
Support targeted international प्रतिबंध on Myanmar military खनन revenues
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: ASEAN for governance reform
के लिए दबाव डालें: UN Security Council action on Myanmar military's resource exploitation
Support National Unity Government (NUG) पर्यावरणीय governance framework
i: Note: Myanmar under the military junta (State Administration Council) has no functioning नागरिक समाज space. Global Witness has published extensive reports on Myanmar's jade industry. Justice for Myanmar — international advocacy organization documenting military business interests.
Myanmar Gems Enterprise — military-controlled entity managing gem auctions. International buyers increasingly apply conflict mineral frameworks to Myanmar sourcing.
International engagement only — domestic regulation under junta is not independent.

Note: Myanmar's elected parliament (Pyidaungsu Hluttaw) was dissolved by the military coup. The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted प्रतिबंध by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked अर्थव्यवस्था ($23.8B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Mining at 26.57% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary लोकतंत्र — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's खनन sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. जब प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय data is linked to production revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees reflecting true scarcity. जब खनन companies pay for water in arid steppe, अतिव्यापी हित water-intensive extraction कमजोर होता है.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: MNET (Ministry of Nature, Environment and Tourism)
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: herder community organizations
Report through Rio Tinto/Oyu Tolgoi compliance channels
Oyu Tolgoi (Rio Tinto): कार्यान्वित करें water recycling and पर्यावरणीय monitoring
Erdenes Mongol (state खनन company): अपनाएं ESG standards
Coal miners (Energy Resources, Aspire Mining): विकसित करें transition plans
MRAM (Mineral Resources and Petroleum Authority): मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय licensing
MNET: लागू करें water extraction limits
EITI Mongolia: Expand to पर्यावरणीय data
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: member of the State Great Khural (76 members) की मांग करने के लिए पर्यावरणीय bonds for all खनन licenses
Support EITI enhanced reporting
Advocate for Mongolia's Third Neighbour Policy to include पर्यावरणीय governance standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: herder community consultation rights in खनन decisions
i: MNET — पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. EITI Mongolia — member since 2007. Mongolia has relatively active नागरिक समाज for the region.
Oyu Tolgoi — the giant copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto 66%, Government 34%). Erdenes Mongol — state खनन holding company. Tavan Tolgoi — massive coal deposit.
MRAM — the खनन regulator. Mongolia's 2006 Minerals Law governs खनन licensing.
State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a संसदीय लोकतंत्र with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism अर्थव्यवस्था ($49.5B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). सेवाएँ 83.8% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. जब social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. जब social costs are visible alongside revenues, अतिव्यापी हित revenue maximization without harm mitigation कमजोर होता है.
DICJ publication of problem gambling prevalence, social cost estimates, and AML compliance data per concessionaire. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report AML violations to DICJ (Gaming Inspection and Coordination Bureau)
Document problem gambling through internal channels
को रिपोर्ट करें: GIF (Financial Intelligence Office)
Concessionaires (Sands China, Galaxy, Wynn, MGM, SJM, Melco): कार्यान्वित करें responsible gambling programs
अपनाएं independent problem gambling impact assessments
मजबूत करें AML controls
DICJ: मजबूत करें responsible gambling requirements in concession terms
IAS (Social Welfare Bureau): Expand problem gambling treatment and prevention
मजबूत करें AML enforcement
Engage through the Macao Legislative Assembly (33 members, partially elected) on gambling harm reduction legislation
Support international responsible gambling standards adoption
Advocate for FATF recommendations implementation on casino AML
के लिए दबाव डालें: independent gambling harm research funding
i: DICJ (Direcção de Inspecção e Coordenação de Jogos) — Macao's gaming regulator. GIF (Gabinete de Informação Financeira) — financial intelligence unit.
Six gaming concessionaires hold licenses renewed in 2023. Sands China (Las Vegas Sands subsidiary), Galaxy Entertainment, Wynn Macau, MGM China, SJM Holdings, Melco Resorts — operate 40+ casinos.
DICJ — the gaming regulator overseeing all casino operations. 2023 concession renewal included enhanced responsible gambling requirements.
Assembleia Legislativa de Macau — 33 members (14 directly elected, 12 indirectly elected, 7 appointed). Macao is a Special Administrative Region of China with limited autonomy.

MR.s: Sahelian अर्थव्यवस्था ($10.9B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with खनन (iron ore, 9.59% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) and agriculture (19.3% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). मत्स्य पालन significant. New hydrogen and gas projects (GTA — Greater Tortue Ahmeyim). Coal at 0.67%.

sectors.w: SNIM iron ore खनन in Zouérat generates dust and water issues. जब पर्यावरणीय monitoring is published, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Environmental bond requirements for खनन. जब remediation is pre-funded, अतिव्यापी हित in unaccountable extraction कमजोर होता है.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय data disclosure. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining disturbs landscapes but rehabilitation can reduce impact.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: Ministry of Environment
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: international channels
SNIM: कार्यान्वित करें पर्यावरणीय management systems
Kinross (Tasiast gold mine): Apply international standards
BP/Kosmos (GTA gas project): अपनाएं प्रति क्षेत्र उत्सर्जन reporting
Ministry of Mines: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय licensing

Support EITI enhanced reporting
Advocate for African Mining Vision implementation
i: Ministry of Environment and Sustainable विकसित करेंment. SNIM (Société Nationale Industrielle et Minière) — state iron ore company.
SNIM — state iron company. Kinross Gold — operates Tasiast mine. BP and Kosmos Energy — developing the GTA gas field.
EITI Mauritania — member since 2005.
Assemblée nationale de Mauritanie — 176 members. Mauritania is a presidential republic with limited democratic space.

MT.s: Small EU island अर्थव्यवस्था ($25B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). सेवाएँ 81.8% (financial services, gaming, tourism). यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्य. Major online gambling hub. No significant natural resources.

sectors.w: Malta licenses ~300 online gambling companies (MGA). जब problem gambling and AML data is published per licensee, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Enhanced MGA licensing requirements with harm data disclosure. Makes अतिव्यापी हित revenue without accountability weaker.
Per-licensee problem gambling and AML compliance data publication. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Online gambling creates addiction risk. Harm reduction measures can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: MGA (Malta Gaming Authority)
Report AML violations to FIAU (Financial Intelligence Analysis Unit)
Use EU Whistleblower Directive protections
Online gambling operators: कार्यान्वित करें responsible gambling programs
अपनाएं independent harm assessments
मजबूत करें AML compliance
MGA: मजबूत करें responsible gambling requirements
FIAU: Enhance AML supervision
MFSA: Coordinate financial and gambling regulation
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: member of the Kamra tad-Deputati (65 members) की मांग करने के लिए enhanced gambling harm disclosure
Support EU-wide online gambling regulation coordination
Advocate for FATF recommendations implementation
i: MGA (Malta Gaming Authority) — licenses and regulates online gambling. FIAU — financial intelligence unit. Malta transposed EU Whistleblower Directive.
Malta hosts ~300 licensed gambling companies including Betsson, Kindred, LeoVegas.
MGA — the gambling regulator. MFSA (Malta वित्तीय सेवाएं Authority) — the financial regulator.
Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU संसदीय लोकतंत्र.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island अर्थव्यवस्था ($14.9B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). सेवाएँ 64.4% (financial services, tourism). विनिर्माण 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

sectors.w: Mauritius is a major offshore financial center, particularly for India-bound investment (India-Mauritius tax treaty). जब beneficial ownership and tax data is transparent, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Full CRS and FATF compliance. जब financial opacity is eliminated, the अतिव्यापी हित कमजोर होता है.
Publication of beneficial ownership data. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Financial services can relocate but Mauritius's India tax treaty and infrastructure create switching costs.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: FSC (वित्तीय सेवाएं Commission)
को रिपोर्ट करें: FIU Mauritius
Use Mauritian मुखबिर protection (Financial Intelligence and AML Act)
Banks and management companies: कार्यान्वित करें enhanced due diligence
अपनाएं ESG criteria in Global Business operations
Comply with FATF recommendations ahead of mandates
FSC: मजबूत करें Global Business licensing
Bank of Mauritius: Enhance AML supervision
EDB (Economic विकसित करेंment Board): Promote substance requirements
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: member of the National Assembly (70 members) की मांग करने के लिए enhanced financial पारदर्शिता
Support OECD BEPS Inclusive Framework
Maintain FATF compliance
Advocate for African financial पारदर्शिता standards
i: FSC — the integrated financial services regulator. FIU — financial intelligence unit.
Mauritius hosts ~900 Global Business companies (Category 1 and 2). Major banks: SBM Holdings, MCB Group.
FSC — regulates the Global Business sector. Bank of Mauritius — the central bank. Mauritius was on the FATF grey list (2020-2021) and implemented reforms.
National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a संसदीय लोकतंत्र with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income अर्थव्यवस्था ($11.3B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). कृषि 31.8% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the अतिव्यापी हित between tobacco growers and buyers कमजोर होता है.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. जब alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, अतिव्यापी हित tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of मिट्टी का क्षरण and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department)
Document child labor — report to Ministry of Labour
Report through tobacco buyer compliance channels (BAT, JTI)
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One), JTI: Support farmer diversification programs
में निवेश करें alternative crop development
अपनाएं Sustainable Tobacco Programme standards
Tobacco Commission: Support diversification transition
Ministry of Agriculture: Scale alternative crop programs
TCC (Tobacco Control Commission): कार्यान्वित करें WHO FCTC provisions
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (193 members) की मांग करने के लिए crop diversification investment
Support WHO FCTC alternative livelihood provisions for tobacco-growing countries
Advocate for international climate finance for agricultural transition
के लिए दबाव डालें: fair trade tobacco pricing during transition period
i: EAD (Environmental Affairs Department) — पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. Ministry of Labour — enforces child labor laws.
Limbe Leaf (Alliance One International subsidiary) — the largest tobacco buyer. JTI, BAT — international tobacco companies sourcing from Malawi.
Tobacco Commission (now TCC — Tobacco Control Commission) — regulates the tobacco sector. Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water विकसित करेंment.
National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential लोकतंत्र. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income अर्थव्यवस्था ($422.2B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). विनिर्माण 22.5% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (electronics, automotive). सेवाएँ 53.7%.

sectors.w: Malaysia produces ~25% of global palm oil. EUDR and MSPO certification create traceability frameworks. जब प्रति संयंत्रation पर्यावरणीय data is linked to trade, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-वनों की कटाई traceability. जब buyers verify origin, अतिव्यापी हित forest conversion for plantations breaks.
Mandatory MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable ताड़ का तेल) certification with independently verifiable पर्यावरणीय data per estate. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: DOE (Department of Environment)
Document labor violations — report to HR Ministry
Report through RSPO complaint mechanisms
Sime Darby, IOI, FGV: Achieve 100% RSPO certification
अपनाएं zero-वनों की कटाई and no-peat commitments
कार्यान्वित करें full supply chain traceability
MPOB: मजबूत करें MSPO certification पर्यावरणीय criteria
DOE: लागू करें peatland drainage regulations
MPIC (Ministry of Plantation Industries): Mandate full traceability
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Ahli Parlimen in the Dewan Rakyat (222 members) की मांग करने के लिए peatland protection enforcement
Support EUDR implementation with transition assistance for smallholders
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: ASEAN for regional zero-वनों की कटाई commitments
के लिए दबाव डालें: RSPO-MSPO mutual recognition with enhanced पर्यावरणीय standards
i: DOE (Jabatan Alam Sekitar / Department of Environment) — पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. SUHAKAM (Human Rights Commission of Malaysia) — investigates rights complaints including in palm oil sector. RSPO — Malaysia co-hosts the RSPO Secretariat.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian ताड़ का तेल Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable ताड़ का तेल) — the national mandatory certification scheme.
Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal संवैधानिक राजतंत्र and संसदीय लोकतंत्र.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing अर्थव्यवस्था ($22.7B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. कृषि 25.2% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. जब per-project पर्यावरणीय and social cost data is published, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and पर्यावरणीय standards. जब development is linked to social outcomes, अतिव्यापी हित extraction without accountability कमजोर होता है.
Per-project पर्यावरणीय disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: MITADER (Ministry of Land, Environment and Rural विकसित करेंment)
Document community displacement — report to international accountability mechanisms
Report through TotalEnergies/ExxonMobil/Eni compliance channels
TotalEnergies (Mozambique LNG), ExxonMobil (Rovuma LNG), Eni (Coral FLNG): कार्यान्वित करें community development and पर्यावरणीय standards
अपनाएं TCFD reporting
Address security and human rights risks per UN Voluntary Principles
INP: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय licensing for LNG projects
MIREME (Ministry of Mineral Resources and Energy): Ensure sovereign wealth fund for gas revenues
Bank of Mozambique: Prepare for resource revenue macroeconomic management
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Deputado in the Assembleia da República (250 members) की मांग करने के लिए transparent management of gas revenues
Support EITI enhanced reporting for Mozambique's gas sector
Advocate for Cabo Delgado stabilization with पर्यावरणीय governance
के लिए दबाव डालें: sovereign wealth fund establishment before major LNG revenues flow
i: MITADER — environment ministry. INP (Instituto Nacional de Petróleo) — the petroleum regulator. Note: Mozambique has limited मुखबिर protections. The Cabo Delgado insurgency complicates नागरिक समाज operations in the gas-rich north.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and खनन policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income अर्थव्यवस्था ($13.4B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with खनन at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). कृषि 7.3% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium खनन (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. जब प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय monitoring is published, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium खनन. जब miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, अतिव्यापी हित water-intensive extraction कमजोर होता है.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय monitoring disclosure. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Uranium खनन generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: MEFT (Ministry of Environment, Forestry and Tourism)
को रिपोर्ट करें: NRPA (National Radiation Protection Authority)
Report through Rössing (Rio Tinto)/Husab (CGN) compliance channels
Rössing Uranium (Rio Tinto), Husab (China General Nuclear): कार्यान्वित करें international radiation safety and पर्यावरणीय standards
अपनाएं प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय reporting
में निवेश करें site rehabilitation planning

NRPA: लागू करें radiation protection standards

Support IAEA पर्यावरणीय standards for uranium producing countries
Advocate for African Mining Vision implementation
के लिए दबाव डालें: Namibia's green hydrogen strategy to include खनन sector transition
i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong नागरिक समाज for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese सरकारी). Namibia also has significant diamond खनन (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees खनन policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential लोकतंत्र with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian अर्थव्यवस्था ($19.9B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). कृषि 34.5% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Uranium खनन (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium खनन (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. जब remediation costs are pre-funded, अतिव्यापी हित in extraction without accountability कमजोर होता है.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय monitoring. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Uranium खनन generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report through Orano compliance channels
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: international monitoring (Greenpeace, CRIIRAD have conducted independent monitoring at Arlit)
को रिपोर्ट करें: EITI Niger
Orano (formerly Areva): कार्यान्वित करें international radiation and पर्यावरणीय standards at Arlit
Address legacy contamination
CNNPC (China): Apply standards to new uranium operations
Ministry of Mines: मजबूत करें uranium खनन पर्यावरणीय requirements
EITI Niger: Include पर्यावरणीय data
IAEA: Support radiation safety standards
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: African Union for democratic governance restoration with खनन पारदर्शिता
Support IAEA पर्यावरणीय and safety standards enforcement
के लिए दबाव डालें: Orano legacy contamination remediation at Arlit
Support EITI enhanced reporting
i: BNEE (Bureau National d'Évaluation Environnementale) — पर्यावरणीय assessment authority. Note: Military rule since July 2023.
Orano — operates SOMAÏR and COMINAK uranium mines at Arlit (COMINAK closed 2021). Chinese companies (CNNPC) have expanding uranium interests.
Ministry of Mines — oversees खनन policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American अर्थव्यवस्था ($19.7B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). कृषि 14.4% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. सेवाएँ 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold खनन generates mercury and cyanide contamination. जब पर्यावरणीय data is published, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Supply chain due diligence for gold sourced from Nicaragua.
Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.
a: Report through international खनन company channels (Calibre Mining, B2Gold)
Document पर्यावरणीय impacts through diaspora channels
Calibre Mining, B2Gold: Apply international पर्यावरणीय standards
अपनाएं EITI-style reporting
Support artisanal खनन formalization
Ministry of Energy and Mines: Environmental licensing
MARENA: Monitoring
Support international human rights monitoring for Nicaragua
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: OAS for governance reform
के लिए दबाव डालें: खनन company home-country oversight
i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly सत्तावादी. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — खनन regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian अर्थव्यवस्था ($42.9B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). कृषि 21.9% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. जब per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: सुधार करें agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. जब hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, अतिव्यापी हित unsustainable cultivation कमजोर होता है.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: DoE (Department of Environment)
Report through local government channels (municipality/rural municipality)
Agricultural companies: Support terracing and agroforestry programs
Hydropower companies: में निवेश करें watershed protection upstream of reservoirs
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture): सुधार करें subsidy structure toward soil conservation
MOFE: मजबूत करें watershed management
DSCWM (Dept of Soil Conservation and Watershed Management): Scale programs
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: member of the Pratinidhi Sabha (House of Representatives, 275 members) की मांग करने के लिए hillside agriculture conservation programs
Support climate adaptation finance for Nepal's agricultural sector
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: SAARC for regional watershed management
के लिए दबाव डालें: GLOF (glacial lake outburst flood) early warning and prevention investment
i: DoE — पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock विकसित करेंment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced अर्थव्यवस्था ($260.2B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. कृषि 4.4% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद but outsized पर्यावरणीय footprint (dairy is largest export sector). सेवाएँ 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). जब per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: कार्यान्वित करें the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. जब farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, अतिव्यापी हित herd expansion कमजोर होता है.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.

आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: regional councils (Canterbury, Waikato — primary water quality enforcers)
Document water quality violations — report to MfE (Ministry for the Environment)
Use NZ Protected Disclosures Act 2022
Fonterra: अपनाएं binding waterway protection targets across all supplier farms
कार्यान्वित करें methane reduction technology (Kowbucha, Zelp)
Diversify cooperative revenue beyond dairy commodity
MfE: लागू करें NPS-FM bottom lines for nitrogen and E. coli in waterways
MPI (Ministry for Primary Industries): सुधार करें farm support toward पर्यावरणीय outcomes
EPA: मजबूत करें agricultural chemical regulation
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives (120 members) की मांग करने के लिए enforcement of freshwater bottom lines
Support NZ Emissions Trading Scheme inclusion of agricultural उत्सर्जन (planned by 2025, now uncertain)
Advocate for Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP) पर्यावरणीय provisions
के लिए दबाव डालें: inclusion of biological methane in national उत्सर्जन reduction targets
i: Regional councils — the primary पर्यावरणीय regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national पर्यावरणीय policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong मुखबिर protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve पर्यावरणीय bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf अर्थव्यवस्था ($107.1B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum विकसित करेंment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. जब hydrogen revenue streams are established, अतिव्यापी हित oil dependence कमजोर होता है.
Per-field उत्सर्जन disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: Environment Authority
Report through PDO/Shell compliance channels
PDO: Accelerate नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा integration in operations
OQ (state energy company): विकसित करें green hydrogen export capacity
कार्यान्वित करें TCFD reporting
Ministry of Energy and Minerals: Balance oil production with hydrogen transition
EA: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय standards
CBO (Central Bank of Oman): Climate risk in financial supervision
Engage through the Majlis al-Shura (advisory, 86 elected members) on energy transition policy
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: GCC for regional energy transition coordination
Support IRENA recommendations on Gulf state transition
के लिए दबाव डालें: Oman Vision 2040 पर्यावरणीय targets enforcement
i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's पर्यावरणीय regulator. PDO (Petroleum विकसित करेंment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing संसदीय activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant अर्थव्यवस्था ($86.5B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). सेवाएँ 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá खनन contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The अतिव्यापी हित between the खनन company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of खनन contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the अतिव्यापी हित through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report पर्यावरणीय violations during mine closure to MiAmbiente (Ministry of Environment)
Document water quality downstream of Cobre Panamá
Report through First Quantum compliance channels
First Quantum: Cooperate with orderly mine closure and पर्यावरणीय remediation
Ensure worker transition support
Comply with Supreme Court ruling
MiAmbiente: Ensure comprehensive पर्यावरणीय remediation
Ministry of Commerce: Support economic transition for affected communities
Comptroller General: Audit खनन revenue management
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Diputado in the Asamblea Nacional (71 members) की मांग करने के लिए comprehensive mine closure and remediation legislation
Support the Cobre Panamá precedent as a model for democratic resource governance
Advocate for investment treaty reform to protect sovereign पर्यावरणीय decisions
के लिए दबाव डालें: ICSID (World Bank arbitration) reform on पर्यावरणीय sovereignty
i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the खनन contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees खनन concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich अर्थव्यवस्था ($289.2B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with खनन at 12.1% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). कृषि 7.3%. सेवाएँ 51.3%. Social conflicts around खनन are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's खनन sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). जब पर्यावरणीय monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. जब indigenous communities can effectively negotiate पर्यावरणीय conditions, अतिव्यापी हित extraction without consent कमजोर होता है.
Mandatory प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's खनन पर्यावरणीय standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: OEFA (Organismo de Evaluación y Fiscalización Ambiental)
Document community impacts — report to Defensoría del Pueblo
Report through खनन company compliance channels
Antamina, Cerro Verde, Las Bambas operators: कार्यान्वित करें community development agreements
अपनाएं international tailings standards (GISTM)
Publish प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय data
OEFA: Increase पर्यावरणीय monitoring and enforcement
MINEM: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय conditions in खनन concessions
ANA (Autoridad Nacional del Agua): लागू करें water quality standards downstream of mines
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Congresista in the Congreso de la República (130 members) की मांग करने के लिए enforcement of consulta previa and पर्यावरणीय monitoring
Support ILO Convention 169 enforcement on indigenous consultation
Advocate for Escazú Agreement ratification
के लिए दबाव डालें: EITI enhanced reporting with पर्यावरणीय data
i: OEFA — Peru's पर्यावरणीय enforcement agency for the खनन sector, conducting inspections and imposing प्रतिबंध. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts पर्यावरणीय impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and खनन ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island अर्थव्यवस्था ($31.8B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Mining at 14.41% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). कृषि 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's खनन sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic पर्यावरणीय damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory पर्यावरणीय bonds per IFC Performance Standards. जब remediation is pre-funded, अतिव्यापी हित in low-cost disposal कमजोर होता है.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: CEPA (Conservation and Environment Protection Authority)
Document community impacts through local NGOs and customary landowner groups
Report through Barrick Gold/Newcrest compliance channels
Barrick Gold (Porgera), Newmont (Lihir), Ok Tedi Mining: कार्यान्वित करें international पर्यावरणीय standards
Address legacy contamination
अपनाएं EITI enhanced reporting
MRA (Mineral Resources Authority): मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय conditions in खनन leases
CEPA: लागू करें पर्यावरणीय standards
EITI PNG: Expand to पर्यावरणीय data
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: member of the National Parliament (111 members) की मांग करने के लिए पर्यावरणीय bonds for all खनन operations
Support customary landowner rights in खनन negotiations
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: Pacific Islands Forum for regional पर्यावरणीय standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: international accountability for खनन legacy contamination (Ok Tedi)
i: CEPA — PNG's पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — खनन regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the खनन regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a संवैधानिक राजतंत्र (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style संसदीय लोकतंत्र.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian अर्थव्यवस्था ($461.6B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). सेवाएँ 63.2% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. कृषि 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). विनिर्माण 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel खनन (for EV batteries) generates significant पर्यावरणीय damage on small islands. जब प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय data is linked to nickel exports, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for खनन permits. President Duterte's 2017 खनन audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks अतिव्यापी हित non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: DENR (Department of Environment and Natural Resources)
Document community impacts through नागरिक समाज organizations
को रिपोर्ट करें: Mines and Geosciences Bureau
Nickel Asia, Global Ferronickel: कार्यान्वित करें international पर्यावरणीय standards
अपनाएं responsible खनन certification
Support community development agreements
DENR: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय monitoring and enforcement
MGB: Require पर्यावरणीय bonds
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau): लागू करें pollution standards
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Representative in the House of Representatives (316 members) or Senator की मांग करने के लिए enforcement of खनन पर्यावरणीय standards
Support Alternative Mining Bill with enhanced पर्यावरणीय protections
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: ASEAN for regional खनन standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: EU Battery Regulation traceability for Philippine nickel
i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages खनन regulation. Philippines has relatively active नागरिक समाज and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs खनन operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential लोकतंत्र.

PK.s: Large अर्थव्यवस्था ($371.6B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with agriculture at 23.7% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). विनिर्माण 13.2%. सेवाएँ 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. जब per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: सुधार करें agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. जब farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, अतिव्यापी हित water-intensive monoculture कमजोर होता है.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: Pakistan EPA (Environment Protection Agency)
Document water contamination — report to WAPDA (Water and Power विकसित करेंment Authority)
Report through provincial agricultural extension services
Agricultural input companies: विकसित करें water-efficient farming solutions
Textile companies (reliant on Pakistani cotton): Support sustainable cotton initiatives
में निवेश करें drip irrigation technology
Ministry of National Food Security: सुधार करें water pricing for agriculture
IRSA (Indus River System Authority): लागू करें provincial water allocations
Provincial agriculture departments: Support crop diversification
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: MNA (Member of National Assembly, 342 members) or Senator की मांग करने के लिए agricultural water pricing reform
Leverage Pakistan's Climate Vulnerable Forum membership to advocate for agricultural adaptation finance
Support Indus Waters Treaty modernization for climate adaptation
के लिए दबाव डालें: international climate loss and damage finance (Pakistan's 2022 floods were a catalyzing case)
i: Pakistan EPA — federal पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own पर्यावरणीय agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal संसदीय लोकतंत्र.

PL.s: Major EU अर्थव्यवस्था ($917.8B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). विनिर्माण 16.1% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. सेवाएँ 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. जब full carbon costs are internalized, the अतिव्यापी हित between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The अतिव्यापी हित breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant उत्सर्जन and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: GIOŚ (Chief Inspectorate of Environmental Protection)
Document health impacts in खनन regions — report to GIS (Chief Sanitary Inspectorate)
Use Polish मुखबिर law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)
PGE, Tauron, Enea, PGG: विकसित करें coal phase-out plans with worker transition
में निवेश करें offshore wind (Baltic Sea — major potential)
अपनाएं per-unit उत्सर्जन reporting
URE (Energy Regulatory Office): सुधार करें tariffs to reflect carbon costs
Ministry of Climate: कार्यान्वित करें National Energy Policy 2040
NFEP (National Fund for Environmental Protection): Finance mine closure and remediation
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Poseł or Senator in the Sejm/Senat की मांग करने के लिए accelerated coal phase-out with just transition measures
Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support
के लिए दबाव डालें: territorial just transition plans with concrete retraining programs
i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief पर्यावरणीय inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal खनन company (सरकारी, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the ऊर्जा नियामक. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the पर्यावरणीय fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with खनन unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of सकल घरेलू उत्पाद — among world's highest pharma concentration). सेवाएँ 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). जब diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: सुधार करें food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. जब imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, अतिव्यापी हित high-margin processed imports कमजोर होता है.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal मुखबिर protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development
अपनाएं voluntary front-of-pack labelling
PR Department of Agriculture: Expand local food production programs
Department of Health: कार्यान्वित करें nutrition education and labelling requirements
FDA: Apply US food labelling regulations
Contact Puerto Rico's Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives to advocate for food access and local agriculture funding
Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
के लिए दबाव डालें: local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal मुखबिर protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, severely constrained by occupation). कृषि 7.4% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. सेवाएँ 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). जब water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. जब Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, अतिव्यापी हित restricting agricultural development कमजोर होता है.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme प्रणाली निर्भरता. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
को रिपोर्ट करें: international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
में निवेश करें water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document पर्यावरणीय impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: UN for equitable water allocation
के लिए दबाव डालें: World Bank monitoring of economic impact of water restrictions on Palestinian agriculture
Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU अर्थव्यवस्था ($313.3B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). सेवाएँ 66.3% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. कृषि 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). विनिर्माण 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: कार्यान्वित करें EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
Not fully breakable. सुधार करेंulation mandates reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese मुखबिर law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: सुधार करेंulate products
अपनाएं front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): कार्यान्वित करें labelling
ASAE: लागू करें marketing standards
SNS: Publish health expenditure data
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) की मांग करने के लिए health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's मुखबिर protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a संसदीय लोकतंत्र.

PY.s: Landlocked South American अर्थव्यवस्था ($44.5B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). कृषि 10.7% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). विनिर्माण 19% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. सेवाएँ 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe वनों की कटाई from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco वनों की कटाई. जब per-farm वनों की कटाई and मिट्टी का क्षरण data is linked to soy exports, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-वनों की कटाई soy. जब EU buyers require verified वनों की कटाई-free origin, अतिव्यापी हित Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based वनों की कटाई monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce मिट्टी का क्षरण.
a: Report illegal वनों की कटाई to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): कार्यान्वित करें zero-वनों की कटाई soy sourcing for Paraguay
अपनाएं Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
में निवेश करें yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: लागू करें the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate पर्यावरणीय standards into soy export certification
INFONA: मजबूत करें forest monitoring and enforcement
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional की मांग करने के लिए extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur पर्यावरणीय provisions enforcement
के लिए दबाव डालें: indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where वनों की कटाई continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated अर्थव्यवस्था ($219.2B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). उद्योग 58.2% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. तेल किराया 15.28% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद, gas rents 12.01% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद — world's largest LNG exporter. सेवाएँ 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ उत्सर्जन globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. जब importers reduce LNG dependence, the अतिव्यापी हित कमजोर होता है.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, अतिव्यापी हित fossil gas dependence कमजोर होता है.
Per-field उत्सर्जन and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle उत्सर्जन.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: QatarEnergy HSE division
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
को रिपोर्ट करें: Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
में निवेश करें blue and green hydrogen
Reduce routine flaring to zero
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change: लागू करें air quality standards around Ras Laffan
KAHRAMAA (Qatar General Electricity & Water Corporation): Mandate energy efficiency
Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate उत्सर्जन reduction targets
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional उत्सर्जन standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
के लिए दबाव डालें: LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on उत्सर्जन intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — सरकारी, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — पर्यावरणीय regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्य अर्थव्यवस्था ($382.6B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). विनिर्माण 13.2% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद. गैस किराया 0.53%, oil 0.38%. सेवाएँ 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्यship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. जब soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. जब subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, अतिव्यापी हित exhaustive monoculture कमजोर होता है.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: Report illegal logging to Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură
को रिपोर्ट करें: Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: Agent Green or EuroNatur
Large agricultural companies: कार्यान्वित करें EU eco-schemes
Holzindustrie Schweighofer (now HS Timber): अपनाएं certified sustainable sourcing
Agricultural associations: अपनाएं soil health targets
APIA: Condition CAP payments on eco-scheme compliance
Ministry of Environment: मजबूत करें Forest Code enforcement
ANPM (National Environmental Protection Agency): Expand monitoring
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: Deputat in the Camera Deputaților (330 members) or Senator in the Senat (136 members) की मांग करने के लिए Forest Code enforcement
Submit EU Pilot complaints on illegal logging through European Commission
Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian पर्यावरणीय NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — पर्यावरणीय protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). यूरोपीय संघ का सदस्य since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.
