Ministry of Mines and Minerals विकसित करेंment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African विकसित करेंment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African अर्थव्यवस्था ($41.5B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). Mining 4.24% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). कृषि 8.7%. विनिर्माण 15.6%. वन किराया 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's खनन sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). जब प्रति खदान पर्यावरणीय data is published alongside revenue, W गणनीय हो जाता है.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). जब EU buyers require पर्यावरणीय verification, अतिव्यापी हित unregulated extraction कमजोर होता है.
Per-mine पर्यावरणीय monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). W को गणनीय बनाता है.
आंशिक रूप से तोड़ा जा सकता है. Lithium खनन (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce प्रणाली निर्भरता.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international खनन company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): कार्यान्वित करें international पर्यावरणीय standards
Prospect Lithium (Bikita Minerals): अपनाएं responsible lithium खनन practices
Zim Integrated (Arcadia): Apply EU Battery Regulation-aligned पर्यावरणीय standards
Ministry of Mines: लागू करें पर्यावरणीय conditions in खनन licenses
EMA: मजबूत करें पर्यावरणीय impact assessment for lithium projects
ZMDC (Zimbabwe Mining विकसित करेंment Corporation): Require पर्यावरणीय compliance from joint venture partners
Engage through available संसदीय channels — Parliament of Zimbabwe: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members); note limited political pluralism in practice
Support EU Battery Regulation supply chain due diligence requirements for Zimbabwean lithium
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: SADC Mining Protocol for regional पर्यावरणीय standards
के लिए दबाव डालें: EITI membership to improve खनन पारदर्शिता
i: EMA — पर्यावरणीय management agency. ZELA — पर्यावरणीय law organization. Note: नागरिक समाज space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium खनन (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining विकसित करेंment. EMA — पर्यावरणीय regulation. ZMDC — state खनन company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest अर्थव्यवस्था ($18,743.8B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). विनिर्माण 24.9% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद — global factory floor. कोयला किराया 0.61%. उद्योग 36.5%. सेवाएँ 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा annually than any other country. जब renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, अतिव्यापी हित coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. जब existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the अतिव्यापी हित breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant उत्सर्जन data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial पर्यावरणीय protection bureaus
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: 12369 पर्यावरणीय complaint hotline
State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
में निवेश करें grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets
Support US-China climate cooperation mechanisms (Sunnylands process)
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: COP process for China's coal phase-down commitments
के लिए दबाव डालें: national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. 12369 hotline — पर्यावरणीय complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate पर्यावरणीय data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All सरकारी, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National विकसित करेंment and सुधार करें Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a एक-दलीय राज्य — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced अर्थव्यवस्था ($1,875.4B सकल घरेलू उत्पाद). विनिर्माण 26.6% सकल घरेलू उत्पाद (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). सेवाएँ 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant लोकतंत्र.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. जब carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the अतिव्यापी हित breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. जब carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, अतिव्यापी हित coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant उत्सर्जन and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. W को गणनीय बनाता है.
तोड़ा नहीं जा सकता. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: को रिपोर्ट करें: Ministry of Environment (환경부)
के माध्यम से दस्तावेजीकरण करें: KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)
Report through KEPCO compliance channels
KEPCO (Korea Electric Power Corporation, 한국전력공사): कार्यान्वित करें coal retirement schedule aligned with NDC
POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan
Ministry of Environment: मजबूत करें K-ETS carbon price floor
KPX (Korea Power Exchange): सुधार करें merit order to disadvantage coal
अपने प्रतिनिधि से संपर्क करें: 국회의원 (Member of the National Assembly, 300 members) की मांग करने के लिए coal phase-out timeline in energy legislation
Support Powering Past Coal Alliance membership
के माध्यम से वकालत करें: OECD for coal finance phase-out
के लिए दबाव डालें: G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — पर्यावरण प्राधिकरण. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest पर्यावरणीय NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national उत्सर्जन). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
